faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?
faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
faqs.answer:
Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.
Know more about -
Electrical Engineering Courses

faqs.question: Does the BTech Electrical Engineering syllabus focus more on theory or practical application?
faqs.answer:
The syllabus for the B Tech EE course focuses on both aspects because they are equally important for you to do well at the workplace in the future. There are theory classes to make you understand the meaning and workings of the Electrical Engineering concepts, and practical lab work and industrial training to give you a glimpse of the real-world applications.
Know more about -
Electrical Engineering Courses

A:    The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sri Venkateshwaraa College of Engineering and Technology, Puducherry.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of placement for my course was 75%. The highest package was 24 LPA. The average package was 4 LPA. The companies were recruiting like Wipro, Amazon, Flipkart, Infosys, and Google. The percentage of getting an internship for my course was 60%.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure and facilities were nice. College did not provide internet. Labs were good. Classrooms were nice. There were 3 libraries. All types of books were available. Hostel rooms were good. But food was average. Sports and medical facilities were good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Sri Venkateshwara College of Engineering and Technology review.

review_content.Placements: There is a placement cell in our institute. If you have any doubts regarding placement you can also visit the placement cell. From 2nd year onwards, faculty from the placement cell will train you for placements. Top companies like Accenture, Cognizant, etc., often visit our institute. The highest package is 25 LPA, and the lowest package is around 5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have separate blocks for various courses and departments. We have 4 seminar halls, one auditorium, conference hall, and 3 libraries. There are bus facility, canteen, bookstore, and emergency rooms for students. There are around 20 to 30 security members are there. I love the park in choosing MITS Chittoor near NPN block. There is a library, which is available 24X7 in our institute in NPN block. There is a capacity for 80 students in a class.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Placement are good and good college for education.

review_content.Placements: 80% percent of students got placed in my course in 2018 batch. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Infosys Amazon and Microsoft. The top roles offered are software developed and project manager. Around 60% of students got internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university is highly equipped with all the necessary equipment for statistical research, with projectors and smart boards in the classrooms and Wi-Fi connectivity throughout the campus. The hostels are also well-equipped with Wi-Fi connectivity, reading halls and many more facilities, like vast mess halls, all-time medical facilities, and a canteen which runs about 14 hours a day.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure and placements are good.

review_content.Placements: The placement scenario is good. Companies are TCS, DXC, Wipro, Infosys, Teach Mahindra, Deloitte etc. Visit our college for placements. 85 percent of students were placed in course per annum. The highest package is 38 LPA and the lowest package is 7 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is equipped with many good facilities. They provide good Wi-Fi connectivity for labs, spacious digital classrooms, library with a huge collection of books. There are many departments in our college. They provide hostel facility and the food is very healthy and hygiene.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sri Venkateshwaraa College of Engineering and Technology, Puducherry.

review_content.Placements: Above 65% of students got placements. The highest package is 56 LPA, the lowest package was 3.5 LPA, and the average package is 6-8 LPA. Students have to learn additional things to crack an interview. The top recruiting companies are Infosys, Amazon, Deloitte, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Beautiful college infrastructure with separate building blocks for each department. Labs and classrooms are good. Required equipment is provided in the labs while practicing. Lab in-charge will guide us on how to use those tools. Canteen and medical facilities are present.

Other necessary facilities, like a hostel, canteen, sports and medical facilities, were available for the college students.

review_summary.college_name: Xavier Institute of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: With less percentile hoping for a good college, it is a good place with average packages.

content.Placements: Students get placements from the 3rd year onwards in our college. From the 4th semester, students become eligible for placements. Companies like Godrej Infotech, Newfold Digital, Zycus, Acron, L&T Finance, etc., visited our campus. The highest salary package offered till now this year is 32 LPA. The average salary package offered is around 7 LPA - 8 LPA. Around 85% of students got placed. Many students choose to go for higher studies. My plan after getting a degree is to go for higher studies.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are both air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned. We switch to different classrooms according to different lectures. Labs are well-equipped. Lecturers are held regularly. The library is good with various books. Washrooms are clean. There is a good quality water filter that provides both normal and cold water. We have 3 beautiful turfs and one basketball court which you can use anytime, mainly students play after college. You can play cricket, football, basketball, badminton, carrom, chess, and table tennis. You don't need to wear ID cards. The college is well-maintained in terms of infrastructure. There's no hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The college offers decent placements and qualified faculty to the IT course students.

content.Placements: Xavier Institute provides best placements opportunities to its students. Every year, around 30–35% of the students gets placed at this college. average package offered at the college was between 3 and 6 LPA. The top recruiters in this college were Infosys, North Ladder, Jio, Airtel, etc. The top roles offered in the course were project head, associate, analyst, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Xavier Institute had really good infrastructure for the information technology course. All the facilities offered at this college were really good. The library of the college was well stocked. The entire college campus had a Wi-Fi facility. Other necessary facilities, like a hostel, canteen, sports and medical facilities, were available for the college students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: CSE course from the Xavier Institute offers good faculty and facilities to the students.

content.Placements: Xavier Institute provides best placements opportunities to its students. In the CSE branch, around 40–45% of the students gets placed at this college. The average package offered at the college was between 3 and 6 LPA. The top recruiters in this college were Infosys, North Ladder, KPMG, Deloitte, etc. The top roles offered in the course were software developers, web developers, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The Xavier Institute had really good infrastructure for computer science. The labs of the college had properly working computers for the students programming practice. The library of the college was well stocked. The entire college campus had a Wi-Fi facility. Other necessary facilities, like a hostel, canteen, sports and medical facilities, were available for the college students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Almost 96% of students get placed in good companies. The placement process can get a little slow at times, but eventually, every student gets the opportunity to sit for the placements. Our college also provides training courses to help students train for the aptitude tests and so on.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent, with Wi-Fi available throughout the campus for free. Labs are clean and equipped with good machines and high-speed internet connections. Besides this, other facilities like printers, projectors, smart boards, etc., are also available for students to use at any time of the day.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is value for money with decent placements and great teaching staff.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students are placed, and around 20% of students get placed with salary package of 8 LPA. The average salary package offered is around 5 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA. The top recruiting company is Quantiphi which recruits for roles like business analyst, framework engineer. Internships are mostly through student's own efforts and not through this college this is one disadvantage. A lot of students found internships through online portals and personal contacts, to conclude BE in information technology if completed from XIE with good marks and decent technical skills can fetch students a good IT role with a 6 LPA at least which is a good start for a fresher.

reviews.review_text: Although the infrastructure for this college classrooms and laboratories are decent with high-speed internet connectivity everywhere. The classrooms do no have air-conditioning which makes it hard to beat Mumbai heat sometimes. Other than that laboratories have appropriate machines and other tools required. This college also has a good canteen and common area to sit, relax, and eat. This college does not have a hostel facility.

reviews.review_heading: It has a decent infrastructure. It has good placements and helpful facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are great facilities in our college. It also has a great infrastructure. It has a full range of Wi-Fi for the students as well as teachers. It has a library, playground, canteen, indoor games court, etc. I have no idea about the hostel. A first aid kit is available on every floor.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest you don't take admission to this college at all. You will not get placed in any company.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi does not work here properly, but labs are good. The library is a little bit good, but they are not updating the books at all. The canteen is good, and our college also has medical facilities. Our college is also good in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Xavier Institute of Engineering at a glance.
reviews.review_text: The Labs in XIE are fully furnished and air conditioned. The Class have the projector facility and a whiteboard and blackboard. The library consists of all the books you need as per your curriculum, it also has competitive exam books. Though I didn't opt for the Hostel facilities we have the hostel facility for both boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: XIE has great teaching staff members, but it does not have great placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has great and spacious labs and classrooms for the electronics and telecommunication branch with all the required instruments and practical setups. Air-conditioners are available only in labs. There is no Wi-Fi on the college premises for students. XIE also has a great and massive library on the premises, which has all the required reference books needed for the curriculum. There are no hostel facilities provided by the college, but students from outstations can rent rooms or stay in...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied due to teachers, good placements in 2020, good and small infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. It is a 3-floor building, and each floor consists of each department. The library is located on the 1st floor, and we also have a digital library. There is no hostel provided by the institute. The food quality in the canteen is very good, and we have vegetarian thali, non-vegetarian thali and also every Chinese item. It also has a cricket ground, basketball court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing college in terms of placement and teachers.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good with proper management of labs on weekly basis. Food quality was just average. In terms of extra curricular activities and sports our college is on top, but the faculty doesn't support students. But all the seniors manages the activities properly and win number of prizes in different competition.

reviews.review_heading: One of the Best Engineering college in Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and Labs at XIE are air-conditioned with a facility of the projector. The classrooms are well-equipped with Blackboard and benches. Labs have enough computers to compared to students. The internet connection provided has a speed of 100 MBPS. Students are allowed to work in Labs for course projects. The library has books on various topics academics, fictional, non-fictional. Students are allowed to study in the library enough benches and desks are provided. The XIE has big ground w...

reviews.review_heading: Only dissatisfied in the sports events, no sports events was held properly.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were very good all classroom was well-maintained Wi-Fi was proper and labs were conducted at the proper time and the library was well maintained. And coming to the infrastructure, of course, was very good. Coming to the hostel, the hostel was not there in our college the canteen was good and proper maintained and the sports event was very good but there was a shortage of gymkhana space.

reviews.review_heading: Only dissatisfied in the sports events no sports events is held and no encouragement for sports.
reviews.review_text: Internet was very third class no internet was good. And about the classrooms its was well. And no sports facilities were given for the student so that they can spend on that and the library was excellent. Labs was well conduct and well managed by the teacher.

reviews.review_heading: Our college principal is the best.
reviews.review_text: Every corner on the campus has access to Wi-Fi. Students have to go for registration to avail it. Classrooms are clean, and the tables are designed so good that it is comfortable for us to make engineering drawings and other drawings. Labs are renovated, and every lab is air-conditioned. We have a gymkhana where we all play table tennis and carrom. We do have two grounds, one for basketball and the other for cricket and football.

review_summary.college_name: S.A. Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: S. A. Engineering College is really the best engineering college.

content.Placements: S. A. Engineering College was a more reputed placement college. This college had good placement training cell. So every year 80-90% of students got placed in reputed companies like Wipro, Infotech, Infosys, Zoho, Accenture, TVS, etc. The highest salary package was 7 LPA. The lowest salary package was 2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: S. A. Engineering College campus environment and infrastructure facilities were excellent. More number of classrooms, well-stocked library, and modern laboratories were available at this college. This college provided good hostel facilities for boys and girls. Hostel food quality was more hygienic. This college had good sports grounds and coaching staffs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Improper hostel and the management.

content.Placements: In this college, 85% of students got placed. The packages are moderate and the staffs are not giving the proper coaching and placement training for the average students. They give importance to their subject's marks and their own subject and the HOD is more arrogant.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, the hostel food is very poor. The warden is so strict and he does not respond to the complaints and take action for the students when they make small mistakes. The hostel is very poor and the staffs are so irritating in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The worst college and management.

content.Placements: In our college, placement training in the current year is not well. In my department's final year, only 50% of students are placed. Many companies visit our college to drive but only four or five members are picked for the whole college next year. It is most complicated to get placed on campus.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of college is not good. Classroom infrastructure is good. My college does not provide parking facilities for students' vehicles. They do not have any ground to play outdoor games. The ground is small and the canteen is not maintained correctly.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The worst College I have ever seen.

content.Placements: The percentage of students got placed in my course is 5% only. In my department, my senior strength is 60 but from that 60 only 1 or 2 students are placed in the core company, other than that 10 students are placed in BPOs and the highest package is 7 LPA and the lowest is 1.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: In my college, hostel facilities are worst. It has Wi-Fi, but can't connect to everyone. It has a gym only for the showcase. Food is worse and there is no optional food only meals for lunch and dinner is much worse. Sports is just like school.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has the best infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our college provides 100% placements every year. Mostly, our college has placements from the BPO company for the IT department. IT students did not have enough IT companies to get placed. The highest package offered to students till now is 5 LPA only from 1 company.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is the best one when compared to other small colleges. New buildings are built for the upcoming courses. The hostel provides below-average food. The hostel is not good enough for the students to eat and stay.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in S.A. Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Getting admission to S.A. Engineering College is generally attainable for students who meet the eligibility criteria, especially if they have a solid academic record. Admission is often based on entrance exams, such as TNEA (Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions) for undergraduate programs, which considers students' 12th-grade marks in relevant subjects. While competition might not be as intense as in some top-tier colleges, performance in the qualifying exams is essential. Additionally, there are reserved seats under management quotas, which may offer a more flexible admission process, though typically with higher fees.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to MCA at S.A. Engineering College?

Engineering College, you must have a Bachelor's degree in any discipline with Mathematics as a subject either at the 10+2 level or during graduation. reviews.review_heading: S. A. Engineering College is really the best engineering college.
reviews.review_text: S. A. Engineering College campus environment and infrastructure facilities were excellent. More number of classrooms, well-stocked library, and modern laboratories were available at this college. This college provided good hostel facilities for boys and girls. Hostel food quality was more hygienic. This college had good sports grounds and coaching staffs.

reviews.review_heading: Improper hostel and the management.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the hostel food is very poor. The warden is so strict and he does not respond to the complaints and take action for the students when they make small mistakes. The hostel is very poor and the staffs are so irritating in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college and management.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is not good. Classroom infrastructure is good. My college does not provide parking facilities for students' vehicles. They do not have any ground to play outdoor games. The ground is small and the canteen is not maintained correctly.

reviews.review_heading: The worst College I have ever seen.
reviews.review_text: In my college, hostel facilities are worst. It has Wi-Fi, but can't connect to everyone. It has a gym only for the showcase. Food is worse and there is no optional food only meals for lunch and dinner is much worse. Sports is just like school.

reviews.review_heading: It has the best infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best one when compared to other small colleges. New buildings are built for the upcoming courses. The hostel provides below-average food. The hostel is not good enough for the students to eat and stay.

reviews.review_heading: I have.a good experience at the college, but I am dissatisfied with the hostel and canteen food.
reviews.review_text: The department labs are equipped with modern and advanced equipment, high-speed LAN, and Wi-Fi connections. Classrooms are well-lit, spacious, and can easily accommodate 70-80 students. It also has projectors in every class. The library comprises all the relevant books for the course. It consists of more than 10,000 books either relevant to the course or not. We can access the online library function to reserve books and access some e-books. The hostel rooms and the food are average

reviews.review_heading: College Information and Details.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are maintained really very neat and clean. The infrastructure of the college is very pleasant. The quality of the hostel is good, and there is food available for the hostel students, and the quality of the food is good. They provide various kinds of food to the students.

reviews.review_heading: We design your tomorrow. Absolutely satisfied with the teaching faculty but not the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text:
The faculty members are knowledgeable, the infrastructure is good and the department has very good facilities. 
Wi-Fi in each lab and classroom is available. The library has over 5000 books.
The hostels are good and the importance of sports is also highly appreciated. A health center is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive review of S. A Engineering College affiliated with Anna University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college includes a library and laboratories for each available course. There are 3 canteens: 2 for snacks and 1 for lunch. There is also a health center with resting beds and an available nurse and doctor in case of emergencies. The hostel facilities provided here are moderate, and the food isn't appreciably good, even after many complaints raised against the food quality; actions are yet to be taken. There are 2 volleyball courts, 1 tennis court, and 1 basketball cour...

reviews.review_heading: If you want to enjoy your college life, then this college will do that 70% of the time.
reviews.review_text:
Good infrastructure and a clean environment are there.
Hostel food is okay. The labs are modified with a new monitor. Sanitation is good. College will greenish and many film shootings are also happening. Entertainment is guaranteed. The hostel is poor.
But the fee is quite high.

reviews.review_heading: Below average college life .
reviews.review_text: Don't expect too much, as the infrastructure here can be something less than your expectations. The appearance of the classes and lab will be decent but for those who are looking for high-tech colleges, this won't be the right choice. The canteen won't look nice.

reviews.review_heading: Review of S.A. Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent. I would rate it 5 out of 5. Computer laboratories are well-equipped. High-speed Wi-Fi is available so that we can access online and coding projects. Hostel rooms are spacious. I would rate it 3 stars for the hostel. Mess is available. The food served in the canteen is average.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good engineering college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides one of the best environments. All the facilities provided in our college are clean and very good for all students and teachers.

reviews.review_heading: This college is for CSE engineering with an average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. It also provides a good library. Laboratory is also better. Classrooms are well-maintained. The hostel infrastructure is not great. Once you enter this college you will love the food but you will also regret it because they serve the same food every day.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with faculty members, but our college has good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are excellent. There is Wi-Fi available only for faculty members. Our classrooms are good, but we do not have any projectors attached for smart classes. There is a large library with many books and journals. The hostel and canteen facilities are good and hygienic. There is a variety of food items available in the canteen at an affordable price. The college gives importance to sports and games.

college_info.intro:
CMR Institute of Technology popular programmes are BTech and MBA. BTech and MBA students are placed in top companies at top positions such as TCS, Accenture, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, and others. BTech students are taught Computer Science and Engineering, AI&ML, ECE, and various other subjects. The basic aim of CMR Institute of Technology is to develop various competent software professionals, researchers, and also entrepreneurs to serve the global society.
CMR Institute of Technology MBA students are taught managerial skills, presentation skills, and communication skills. MBA students can become Mangers, Team Leaders, or can go for various other job profiles after completing education from this college. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with facilities and placements.

review_content.Placements: 65 percent of students get placed in the course. The highest package offered in my course is 12 LPA. The average package offered in my course is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are Capgemini, Cognizant, Microsoft, Accenture, Infosys, Siemens, DBS, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and the infrastructure are very good. We have visual classrooms and labs, which help students get a better experience. The food quality in the hostel and canteen is very healthy and tasty. The college has a well-stocked library that helps students access knowledge from various books.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It provides decent placements with good facilities if you work on your skills.

review_content.Placements: Around 65-70 percent of students from our course got placed. The highest package is around 12 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA, and the average is between 4.5 and 5 LPA. Top hiring companies are Infosys (System engineer), Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini and a few startups. 30 to 40 percent students got internships, mainly in service-based companies and small tech firms, through both on-campus and off-campus. The roles offered are software engineer, Associate engineer, System Analyst, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure for the CSE (AI&ML) department with spacious classrooms, projectors, computer labs, Wi-Fi and a central library. Labs are functional, but systems need upgrades. The hostel facilities are decent. I stayed there for 3 years of my engineering. They are very clean and regularly maintained. Mess food quality is average, suitable for daily needs, and the canteen provides many prices and snack items. There are sports grounds for cricket (I have practised for 2 years under my seniors' guidance ), volleyball, badminton, handball, and indoor games, encouraging extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied but should improve.

content.Placements: This year 70 percent of students have been placed and got internship on our campus. The highest package is about 20 LPA and the lowest and average package for many students is mostly 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies at our college are Infosys, Capgemini, Mindtree, and Cognizant. Top roles offered are AI developed, manager for our course.
content.Infrastructure: We have good architecture in our college and there are projectors in every classroom. Wi-Fi is available on all floors for students and staff. Hostel rooms are neat and well organised and the food will be tasty. We have the CMR hospital for medical emergencies which is free for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has good placements and curriculum, but lacks in extracurricular activities.

content.Placements: My college has really good placements, but compared to last year, this year the placements have really gone down due to the current market situation. Apart from that, our TPO (Training and Placements Officer) has given his best in trying to place almost everyone with 0 current backlogs. Almost 60 percent of the students are placed with some of the other companies as either an intern or a full-time employee. The highest is the 10 LPA, the lowest is the 3.5 LPA, and the average package is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Capgemini, TCS, Infosys, Cognizant, etc. Roles offered are Analyst and Software Engineer.

admission_overview.college_name: CMR Institute of Technology Hyderabad Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: CMR Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: CMR Institute of Technology admission 2025 isopen. The college offers admission toBTech, MTech and MBAprogrammes via scores of Telangana state-level entrance exams. The popular entrance exam scores accepted by CMR Institute of TechnologyareTS EAMCET, TS ECET and TS PGCETfor BTech, MBA and MTech, respectively. However, direct admission is offered to students through B-Category, where the seats are comparatively costly than the regular CMRIT admissions. More details around CMR Institute of Technology admissions are elaborated in the article below.
Tabulated below are the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to CMR Institute of Technology course admission 2025:
CMR Institute of Technology admission process comprises multiple steps. Find below the steps for CMR Institute of Technology admission process 2025:

CMR Institute of Technology application process is completely online. Candidates can apply for B-Category admissions on the CMRIT's official website. Moreover, candidates can also apply via the entrance exams for their desired programmes.

CMR Institute of Technology admissions are completely entrance-based. The college accepts various entrance exams for admission to its UG and PG courses. These are TS EAMCET, TS ECET ad TS PGCET for BTech, MBA and MTech courses. However, direct admission is offered to students through B-Category admission.
After qualifying the respective entrance exams, candidates must participate in the counselling process of the respective entrance exam and fill their college preferences.
Students who get selected at CMRIT are required to pay a certain course fee to confirm their seats

placement_report.college_name: CMR Institute of Technology Hyderabad Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: CMR Institute of Technology Hyderabad Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The placement cell of CMR Institute of Technology Hyderabad ensures placement assistance to every student. The institute invites companies from different sectors to conduct the placement process at the Campus premises.

According to the latest report, the placement has concluded for the students of MBA and BTech batch of 2024. As per the latest report, the highest package offered to the BTech students during CMR Institute of Technology placements in 2024 stood at INR 44 LPA, whereas the highest package offered to the MBA batch 2024 stood at INR 6 LPA . 535 students were placed out of the total strength of 1,044 students from the overall batch of 2024 . The strength of the MBA batch 2024 was 125, of which 82 students were placed in reputed companies . The top recruiters of CMR Institute of Technology Hyderabad in 2024 included Amazon, Paypal, Siemens, Enzen, TCS, Accenture, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, Grip Strapping, Sutherland Global , etc.
Earlier, CMR Institute of Technology Hyderabad placed 491 students of the batch 2023. The highest package offered to the CSE students in 2023 stood at INR 20 LPA .

cut_off.college_name: CMR Institute of Technology Hyderabad Cutoff 2025: Check TS ICET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: CMR Institute of Technology Hyderabad cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

CMR Institute of Technology Hyderabad TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 21688 and 28462 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank.

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 21688, 22227 and 23165, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to CMR Institute of Technology Hyderabad. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The CMR Institute of Technology Hyderabad MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 9654. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 12428, and the 2023 cutoff was 12041 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.
Check the table below to know the year, round, category and quota-wise cutoff.

hostel_campus.college_name: CMR Institute of Technology Hyderabad Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Separate hostels for boys and girls

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied but should improve.
reviews.review_text: We have good architecture in our college and there are projectors in every classroom. Wi-Fi is available on all floors for students and staff. Hostel rooms are neat and well organised and the food will be tasty. We have the CMR hospital for medical emergencies which is free for students.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements and curriculum, but lacks in extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for not only our course but for all the other course students are classrooms with projectors, and for the labs, if we need a computer, then they will provide the labs with a computer and Wi-Fi connections along with projectors. From this year, our campus classrooms are provided with smart boards with Wi-Fi connection, which makes the lectures more interesting. And coming to the hostel, I am a day scholar, but as far as my friends told me, the hostel pr...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and the infrastructure are very good. We have visual classrooms and labs, which help students get a better experience. The food quality in the hostel and canteen is very healthy and tasty. The college has a well-stocked library that helps students access knowledge from various books.

reviews.review_heading: It provides decent placements with good facilities if you work on your skills.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure for the CSE (AI&ML) department with spacious classrooms, projectors, computer labs, Wi-Fi and a central library. Labs are functional, but systems need upgrades. The hostel facilities are decent. I stayed there for 3 years of my engineering. They are very clean and regularly maintained. Mess food quality is average, suitable for daily needs, and the canteen provides many prices and snack items. There are sports grounds for cricket (I have practised for 2 years ...

reviews.review_heading: Good for study purposes, but no events will be performed.
reviews.review_text: The college is good from an infrastructure and faculty point of view. Classrooms have good infrastructure. Lab facilities are very good. It helps students gain a better understanding of the topics taught by the faculty. The food in the hostel is delicious and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placements considering the recession going on in the market.
reviews.review_text: The hostel isn't as good considering the price. The facilities and also permission were difficult to get outside the hostel. Though security is good for girls, it is too pricey for that kind of food, especially since it isn't taken care of as much.

reviews.review_heading: Good learning environment with supportive faculty and solid infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: My department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and high-speed Wi-Fi. It has easy access to a large, resourceful library. The hostel provides decent living facilities, a good-quality mess, and canteen food. Basic medical support and well-maintained sports and games amenities.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, supportive faculty members, and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our course has well-equipped labs, high-speed internet, digital classrooms, and a strong library. Hostel provides Wi-Fi, hygienic food, study spaces, recreation, and 24X7 security, ensuring a comfortable and supportive living environment. Our course has modern classrooms, advanced facilities, and spacious rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Think placements and think CMR.
reviews.review_text: Overall, a good infrastructure, I would say. It has Wi-Fi facilities, neat classrooms with projectors, and a very big library. Computer labs are also available. Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls just beside the campus. Auditorium is also available. Canteen is available.

reviews.review_heading: Student life at CMRIT.
reviews.review_text: We have separate labs for every subject. Facilities in labs and classrooms are okay. I am a day scholar, so I don’t know about the hostel facilities. The quality of food in our canteen is good, and we have a sports room at our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with better placements.
reviews.review_text: Campus is very big, having many classrooms along with the ground for the students to get relaxed and comfortable. There are many places to hang out on the campus itself and the campus has way more trees, which bring a cool breeze that students can chill around for a whole.

reviews.review_heading: Review of CMR Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is well-defined. For every two days, they will be cleaning the room in the hostel. The hostel is maintained neatly. In the hostel, the food is very good, and we can wait daily for the food in the line when the time comes because the food is so religious.

reviews.review_heading: CMR explore to invent.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good in our college. They provide Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and sports area to play games. The quality of the facilities in hostel is good. The quality of food available is excellent but the cost is more expensive than out.

reviews.review_heading: Review of CMR Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: So as per coming to the hostel, there are different categories as I am day scholar, I don't know much about the hostel. Coming to college infrastructure we have a nice infrastructure. We can easily locate classrooms and labs. We do have internet access in our labs.

reviews.review_heading: My college life. Visit ITTT.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good in our college. Hostel is very clean and washrooms are cleaned every two days. Wi-Fi is available throughout our college, labs, and library. Food quality is good, every day we get curd and sambar along with a pickle and curry. Chicken is provided twice a week.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best Sanjivani and the best placements.

content.Placements: In MHT CET, if a student gets above the 95th percentile, then the student gets admission to our college for the Computer Engineering course. The highest package of our college is 27 LPA. Assistant, software engineer, software developer, SAP ABAP, consultant, these are the relevant job roles based on the Computer Engineering course provided by our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college and hostels is very good. The Wi-Fi cables are all over the college for student access. The medical facilities are also available in college campus hostels. The mess and canteen food are also good compared to other colleges. The Best part of our college is that the Sanjivani ranking is top 1 in the Ahmednagar district.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: They absolutely provide placements, and yesterday they secured one placement for a boy.

content.Placements: I don't know about this because this college is new, so I don't have information, but there are very good colleges that I know of that provide very good placements and higher packages. The previous year, one student got a 32 LPA, so this year it is expected to provide over a 32 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: This is a very good hostel, clean and clear, very nice. It's a very good place, and the rector is very professional, intelligent, and strict. The hostel is very clean, strict, and safe. They offer very few courses, but those are necessary.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college infrastructure is very good, gives 100% placement, and it is not 2015 it is 2026.

content.Placements: My college is very good, and it has 100% placement for every student. The highest package is 27 LPA, and lowest package is 3 LPA offered in my college and junior college of engineering. Top companies are Cognizant, Wipro, Tata, and Mahindra. 100% of students got internships in 2008 in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Every possible facility is given to students in our college for girls. There is no exam or tuition. It has a very good department. Free Wi-Fi is available and good quality. It is all about my calling, my unique college happened I am very alone person no one is my friend.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sanjivani College of Engineering, Kopargaon.

content.Placements: As per my observation, placement cell is working hard with their full efforts for our placements. Last batch of 2025 whole students of my department were placed. The average package is 4.5 LPA. All the placed students are satisfied with their jobs as I have contact with them.
content.Infrastructure: College is autonomous, they change their course infrastructure as per the latest needs of world and technology. Hostels are well managed by rector with security, neat, and clean with beverage team. They do manage all the cleaning and maintenance in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My review about this college .

content.Placements: 100% internship for its first-year MBA students. Students have the opportunity to intern with the most coveted consulting companies. The placement record is also excellent. We have companies ranging from the FMCG sector to finance, all visiting our campus for students, and that too, with really decent packages. We also have internship opportunities. In fact, internships are necessary to complete the course. For others, there are 2 placement processes conducted in the final year to ensure that all students land desired and good jobs. TATA, ICICI, HDFC, Amazon, JIO, Myntra, etc. visit the campus and recruit the students.

admission_overview.college_name: Sanjivani College of Engineering Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_process.title: Sanjivani College of Engineering Admission process 2025

paragraphs: Sanjivani College of Engineering admission 2025for all programmes is based on the performance of the candidate in the entrance exam. The college accepts various national-level and state-level entrance exams such asJEE Mains, GATE, MHT CETetc.Sanjivani College of Engineeringis known for its four-year, full-time, flagship BTech programme that offers admission, based on the rank secured by the candidate in JEE Main/ MH-CET. Apart from BTech, Sanjivani College of Engineering also offers other postgraduate-level courses in Management and Engineering. Read on to learn more about Sarjivini's admission:

Sanjivani College of Engineering admission is entrance-based for a majority of its courses. Students are required to go through the national-level/ state-level entrances and then appear for the university-level selection rounds for final admission. Sanjivani College of Engineering admission criteria, inclusive of its eligibility and selection process for popularSanjivani College of Engineering coursesare tabulated below:
Candidates must have completed 10+2 with 45% marks, with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics as compulsory subjects
Candidates must hold a BE/BTech degree with 55% marks and have appeared for the GATE exam.

Sanjivani College of Engineering has a multi-step admission process that students are required to follow to secure a seat in the college. The process starts with filling out an application form, followed by a course-specific entrance exam and other selection rounds (if applicable). Once the selection rounds are over, the college releases course-wise merit lists on their official website that include the names of the shortlisted candidates. Interested candidates can confirm their admission by submitting the fee as per the guidelines mentioned on the website. It is recommended that candidates check the eligibility criteria on the Sanjivani College of Engineering official website before filling out the admission form.
Step-wiseSanjivani College of Engineering admission processis given below:
Step 1: Sanjivani College of Engineering Application Process 2025:

To apply for admission to Sajivani College of Engineering, students must complete the online application form for all undergraduate and postgraduate courses through the college website athttps://sanjivanicoe.org.in/, according to their preferred course. The entire application process is conducted online.
Step 2: Sanjivani College of Engineering Selection rounds 2025

After applying, students must participate in a course-specific entrance exam and other selection rounds (if applicable). Following the selection rounds, course-wise merit lists will be published on the university's official website, listing the names of the shortlisted students.
Step 3: Sanjivani College of Engineering final admission
Candidates who are shortlisted and have their names on the merit lists can submit the fee and confirm their admission to their chosen course at Sanjivani College of Engineering.

faqs.question: Can I get admission directly to the second year of Sanjivani College of Engineering BTech?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sanjivani College of Engineering allows direct admission to the second year of BTech programme. The eligibility criteria for Sanjivani College of Engineering BTech lateral entry is as under:Eligibility:Passed minimum three years or two years (Lateral Entry) Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology with at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of Candidates of Backward Class categories, Economically Weaker Section and Persons with Disability category belonging to Maharashtra State) in any branch of Engineering and Technology from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent;ORPassed BSc Degree from a University Grants Commission (UGC) or Association of Indian Universities recognised University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward Class categories, Economically Weaker Section and Persons with Disability category belonging to Maharashtra State) and passed HSC or its equivalent examination

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

placement_report.college_name: Sanjivani College of Engineering Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Sanjivani College of Engineering Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: During the 2025 Sanjivani College of Engineering placement season, the highest and average package offered stood at INR 27 LPA and INR 5.50 LPA, respectively. The participating recruiters placed over 550 students of the Class of 2025. The top recruiters of Sanjivani College of Engineering placements in 2025 included TCS, Deloitte, Kotak, HCL, Infosys, Indigo, Blue Star, Juspay, and many more .
In total, 44 students from the Civil and Structural Engineering departments have been placed in reputed MNCs with a package of INR 16 LPA. Over 250 companies participated in the hiring process.

During the placements 2024, 778 students got placed. The highest package offered was INR 27 LPA , while the average package stood at INR 5.5 LPA . The median package offered stood at INR 4.5 LPA . More than 250 recruiters took part during the placement drive at Sanjivani College of Engineering.

description: Sanjivani College of Engineering cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Sanjivani College of Engineering JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Sanjivani College of Engineering cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 93248 and 251333 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 93248, B.Tech. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 109242.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 93248.

According to the Sanjivani College of Engineering BTech cut off 2023, the Round 1 and the Last Round closing scores for B.E. in Computer Engineering stood at 91.02 and 95.11, respectively for the General Home State category students. This also confirmed that B.E. in Computer Engineering at Sanjivani College of Engineering is the most competitive specialisation this year.

Sanjivani College of Engineering Cutoff 2023 was concluded after Round 3 for admission to BTech courses. Talking about the last three years' cutoff, Sanjivani College of Engineering MHT CET cutoff 2023 for B.E. in Computer Engineering closed at 87.7 while in 2022, it closed at 89.1 and 91.02 in 2021. reviews.review_text: One filled with various classes, assignments, and the like. There is a really good balance of theory and practical knowledge. We have four semesters, each with a mid-term and an end-term. The hostel rooms are spacious. We have separate hostels for each batch. One room has 3 beds, 3 tables, and 3 chairs provided by the institution. There is also a cupboard for each. 24/7 water and electricity are available. The mess food is also good and hygienic. Our college is self-dependent on electricity, tha...

reviews.review_heading: Sanjivani: The lifeline.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our department are labs with AC rooms, Wi-Fi, libraries, seminar halls, classrooms, washrooms, and drinking water. The hostel is in good condition. Hostel students get cold water for drinking and hot water for bathing. There are many other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Why should you choose only my college?
reviews.review_text: I took the experience last year. As compared to other colleges, my college infrastructure is better. The college fulfills all requirements of students. My department is on the ground floor. There is always clean air in my department. All facilities are available in my department like labs, a project lab, a library, clubs, washrooms, clean or filtered water, and labs provide 24/7 internet. The hostel facility is always the best. Rooms or washrooms are always clean. An ambulance is available for h...

reviews.review_heading: Sanjivani: The combination of treasure knowledge and heaven events and campus life.
reviews.review_text: In the college, various facilities are provided like in each classroom and laboratory, there is digital TV (HikVision. In each laboratory, an air conditioner is provided. There are all sorts of books in the laboratory. A digital laboratory is also there. Talking about the hostels, water and electricity are provided. Wi-Fi and study room are also provided separately. For curricular activities like sports and games, a gymkhana is provided where we can play all sorts of games. The canteen quality i...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied after being a part of Sanjivani College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is fantastic. Classrooms are very good. All classrooms have digital screens or projectors. The library has many types of books. We use these books in academics.

reviews.review_heading: Good learning opportunities are provided for rural area students.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good. There are Wi-Fi classrooms and campus. The library is also very vast. It contains many books related to our subjects. The quality and the facilities provided in the hostel are very good. Rules are good. The campus is also very clean. The quality of food available in the canteen is very good. There is not a single distress about food.

reviews.review_heading: Roller coaster ride at Sanjivani Group of Institutes.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good like the transport facilities, good classes, a bad library which has more than 15000 books. The Wi-Fi campus and very informative lab. The hostel facilities and the canteen are top not the food good. They provide sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It offers an MBA with strong placement support and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: My MBA department offers good classrooms, Wi-Fi, a library, computer labs, and seminar halls for academic activities. The hostel provides furnished rooms and clean washrooms. The canteen has a variety of snacks. Medical facilities are available in our nearby hospital. Sports facilities like cricket, football, basketball, and indoor games along with a gym for fitness are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements for the mechanical department.
reviews.review_text: For mechanical engineering, the biggest department in college is available. 2-3 CAD labs are available. One interesting thing is a BMW engine for students' understanding of machines. A very affordable and quality canteen is available on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Sanjivani: The life line of education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good than other colleges. There is Wi-Fi available in lapse. I have the IIT Bombay setup library. It has every book to read. The hostel is too good. The mess is good and clean. Our college provides support to Port Blair.

reviews.review_heading: Sanjivani College of Engineering is one of the best colleges in the Ahmednagar district.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very good. A lot of money was invested in building labs, libraries, and computer labs in a standard way. The library had thousands of books that we could refer to for our studies, and they were very useful to us. Computers were also good, and each classroom had a projector.

faqs.answer: A:    Getting entry at Don Bosco Institute of Technology, Bangalore can indeed be very competitive-in particular to popular branches like computer science engineering and electronics and communication engineering. This institute generally looks for students who may pass off well in entrance tests like Karnataka CET or other entrance tests that are applicable, in addition to satisfying some academic requirements. The general academic reputation of the institute and its flawless placement records attract a large number of applicants to them every year. Therefore, it is not impossible to be admitted, and students who apply will come ready and even meet the requirements.
faqs.question: Is Don Bosco Institute Of Technology Bangalore hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    Several key documents must be placed in the process to get admitted into Don Bosco Institute of Technology, Bangalore. These typically consist of the application form, academic transcripts from other institutions previously pursued, and a valid eligibility proof that could either be an entrance exam scorecard or any other type. Identity documents in the form of a government ID or even a passport may also have to be provided by the applicants, along with a few recent passport-sized photographs. Contact the admission office or even the official website of the institute because sometimes it's preferable to get information that suits the program and academic year with the latest and most accurate.

overview_faqs.question: Is Don Bosco Institute Of Technology Bangalore a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: It's Don Bosco Institute of Technology in Bangalore is a nice reputation institution, with its main emphasis on engineering and technology-based education. The college has experienced faculty, sound curriculum, and maintaining relations with students for further development. Besides all these, the entire campus, including good laboratories, libraries, and a host of extracurricular activities, enriches the learning experience. A good placement record with many students getting placed in excellent companies is also the hallmark of the institute. Also, because of focusing on a practical mode of learning and industry exposure, it is an invaluable institution for future engineers. overview_faqs.question: How good isDon Bosco Institute Of Technology Bangalore for M.Tech.?
overview_faqs.answer: Don Bosco Institute of Technology, Bangalore, boasts of highly comprehensive programs, which include M.Tech courses. The institute takes pride in a very well-designed curriculum that resembles the standard set by industries worldwide. On one hand, it gives the students both theoretical and practical exposure. The institute faculty members usually qualify by being experienced, hence a very comfortable learning situation is ensured here. The institute always provides much emphasis on research and innovation, which is extremely useful for students pursuing advanced degrees. Its location in Bangalore also turns out to be a nerve hub for technology as well as engineering; hence it attracts enough opportunities for internships as well as job placement, thereby making it alluring for many M.Tech aspirants.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am disappointed with the placements.

content.Placements: The number of students placed in our whole college is below 100 out of few thousand students. In our course, there might be below 15 members who get placed including internships. The highest package is 11 LPA cracked by only one student from our batch. The lowest salary is 2.5 LPA, and the average salary is 3.5 LPA - 4 LPA. Top companies for our course are Maximus and Infosys. Only 1-2 students got internships at IBM company. The top roles offered are SDE roles.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure available is classrooms with chalk and board, labs, and library. But there is no Wi-Fi facility. The hostel infrastructure is good when it is 3-sharing. But now they are offering 4-sharing which is quite congested. The food is not bad. Sports and games facilities are provided only for boys, not for girls. Girls are restricted in the evening.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: DBIT - It is a good college.

content.Placements: The placements provided by this college are pretty good and promising. Although you do not get to be placed in big companies like Google and ITC. The college brings you great choices of companies but not the best so if you want a decent job, then okay.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty much good. The campus is pretty much clean and big. Hostels are decent here at the college. The food is good but not great. The canteen is good although they do not offer you anything different every other day that's it.

individual_reviews.title: Unfiltered insights of DBIT.

content.Placements: I would say that the placements in college are average. The highest package usually ranges from 8 LPA to 9 LPA. Only 5% of students got placed out of all students in the batch. Don Bosco Institute of Technology Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 30719 in the General AI category.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Don Bosco Institute of Technology. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 30719 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 9406, while in 2023, it was 10122.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

Don Bosco Institute of Technology accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering has the lowest cutoff rank of 42518 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 40316, in the General All India quota.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

According to the Don Bosco Institute of Technology B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering stood at 32466 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 97034. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the HS quota students.

The institute is ranked #62 in the Engineering category, and #60 under Engineering (Private) by the Times 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. hostel_campus.college_name: Don Bosco Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: I am disappointed with the placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure available is classrooms with chalk and board, labs, and library. But there is no Wi-Fi facility. The hostel infrastructure is good when it is 3-sharing. But now they are offering 4-sharing which is quite congested. The food is not bad. Sports and games facilities are provided only for boys, not for girls. Girls are restricted in the evening.

reviews.review_heading: DBIT - It is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty much good. The campus is pretty much clean and big. Hostels are decent here at the college. The food is good but not great. The canteen is good although they do not offer you anything different every other day that's it.

reviews.review_heading: Honest insights about DBIT.
reviews.review_text: The major flaw of our college is that it's not Wi-Fi enabled. Few Sims struggle with getting range. Facilities of our department, i.e., labs are mediocre. They still use Windows 7, and keyboards are pretty old. The quality of the hostel is mediocre. The food in the canteen is good compared to the cafeteria. Sports opportunities are given.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students who have an average rank in KCET.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. We have a good water supply for each floor which may be for drinking, washing, etc. There is a common room for both boys and girls. The library is very huge with a wide variety of books other than engineering topics like magazines, journals, newspapers, etc. In our college, we also have a software library where we can get online information.

reviews.review_heading: Unfiltered insights of DBIT.
reviews.review_text: There's a common library for all students from all the branches. Library is pretty good with the collection of books except for the staff who work there. Campus does not have Wi-Fi. I do not stay in the hostel so I can't comment much about it. I've heard that hostel is good, especially the food. Classrooms are kind of old. The food in the canteen is better than cafeteria. The food prepared in canteen is fresh. We have a sports room.

reviews.review_heading: The college is absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good all the like labs, library are very fine and Wi-Fi is not available teacher are friendly nature the quality of food in the hostel is very good but it's quite expensive, canteen is good and good sports guide.

reviews.review_heading: Yea definitely say students that this college will provide all facilities with good opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, they provide a variety of foods and they provide all facilities. The curriculum is designed to align with industry standards, offering programs in fields such as AIML and Computer Science. This alignment is further supported by industry collaborations.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Don Bosco Institute Of Technology, Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities given to men are quite good but not up to mark on the facilities provided, and it is good for an amount of 1 lacs, but 1.5 lacs was a bit to much to my knowledge, and from my friends opinion, I can say that even the girls hostels are very good in their cleanliness and other facilities provided than the boys hostels.

reviews.review_heading: My View on DBIT as a student.
reviews.review_text: College facilities are pretty good. Library, cafeteria, canteen, hostel, and sports room are all well-maintained. Library is good and useful to students and I love it. I would rate it 4/5 because there is no auditorium in college and most of the activities are conducted in seminar halls so an auditorium can be built.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is also good.
reviews.review_text: Our college is accredited with NAAC A. Our department has a well-equipped laboratory. Our classrooms are also good. We have E-resources in the library. They have collaborated with many online course platforms like Coursera, NPTEl, etc. The food quality in the canteen and cafeteria is good. We have 24/7 Wi-Fi on campus. There are medical facilities. They encourage us in sports. We have NSS, NCC, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college because of its faculty, infrastructure, and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Labs are pretty neat with good computers and Wi-Fi. Faculty members in hostels are very good. The mess is pretty decent with vegetarian and non-vegetarian on different days. Our college has a really big cricket ground where a lot of events are done.

reviews.review_heading: One thing good about the college is the attendance, just maintain 70% that's enough.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite well. We have Wi-Fi on our campus. There is a pretty good library with the availability of computers and the internet. We have a xerox shop, a canteen, a sports room, and a gym in the college. Even though I am a day scholar, I can bet that the infrastructure of hostels is nice. We have a big cricket ground, basketball court, kabaddi or volleyball, and a kho-kho ground.

reviews.review_heading: I am pretty satisfied with the campus, but the faculty is mediocre. Placements are getting better.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available, and classrooms have mediocre infrastructure. We have a vast library. Food is good but not great. We have a cafeteria that sells affordable food. First aid is available. We have a basketball court, kabaddi, volleyball, kho-kho, and a cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty and there was no good placement.
reviews.review_text: There was a library, but not many books are there. Every book was outdated. No Wi-Fi; they were not allowing us to use Wi-Fi. No proper equipment in the lab; all were spoiled ones. Classrooms were quite okay, not that bad. Labs were good for our course. Because they set up a new lab for a new course batch. Other labs for other branches were horrible, very horrible. There were no proper computers also.

reviews.review_heading: The Life of a DBITian.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and the hostel infrastructure is also good. There is no Wi-Fi facility for students, but there are many books in the library which help students for getting references, articles, and more. The college is a bit green, which is good for students.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Don Bosco Institute Of Technology, Bangalore

likes.text: Companies such as TCS, Infosys, Jaro, KPMG Capgemini and many more visit here for recruitment.
The training and placement office has been doing great work in providing students with many opportunities of getting placed.

Placements.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: The infrastructure in my college is very good all the laboratories in each and every department are well-equipped.
The food in our college is plenty, and the hostel has free Wi-Fi, spacious rooms, and well-maintained sanitation.

Infrastructure.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: Our college faculty are too friendly, and their teaching is really good where you can get understand well, and our lectures are very strict about the attendance.
The course curriculum is relevant, and it helps students to become industry-ready.

likes.text: It helps to focus the graduating students with in-depth fundamentals of electronics and communication-related courses to evolve them as proficient and skillful in the area of engineering and technology.
The college also conducts events, fests, and other events for the upliftment of students.

highlights.summary:
The registration deadline for AP EAPCET 2026 (without a late fee) has been extended to Mar 17, 2026, for SRKR Engineering College admission to BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering College is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech and BBA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech and MCA. The fee structure for the SRKR Engineering College programmes is around INR 1,80,000 to 4,20,000.

review_content.General: Facilities and infrastructure for my course/department regarding labs and classrooms are fine and cool. There is much greenery. A good infrastructure for labs or systems is provided. Whenever needed, we can do system work in our college labs. There is also an Ideal lab in which we can share our ideas and thoughts to implement innovation projects. We can work there with efficient facilities. There will be no efficient Wi-Fi facility. There are good-quality facilities in our hostel. Games and sports are also played here.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because of facilities provided by my college.

review_content.Placements: Firstly, my college is very good at placements. Most of the final year students got placed in various companies like Cognizant, Infosys, etc. I recently got placed at Cognizant. In my college, 90 percent of students get placed every year. My college offers a lowest package of 3.5 LPA. The highest package offered is 30 LPA. The average package offered is 4 LPA.
