We have a good badminton court, a good volleyball court, and a good cricket ground. My college has a three-storey library which contains all the required books.

faqs.question: Q: How many seats are available at Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering College for all courses combined?

faqs.answer: Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMCACandidate must have passed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with Mathematics as one of the subject at Intermediate or Degree level with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get into Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering College for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

overview_faqs.question: Is Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering College a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering College is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, MCA, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering College has a rating of 4.17 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.46 on Campus Life, 4.18 on Placements, 4.01 on Faculty and 4.25 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Can Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering College be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering College are MCA, B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering College has a rating of 4.2 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4.6, 4.2, 4 and 4.2 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: SRKR Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Not excellent but one of the best. Satisfied with faculty. Dissatisfied with classrooms.

content.Placements: Coming to academic development in my course, several students are getting selected in good companies like Cognizant, Infosys. But the package they got selected for is not that much, it's like 3 LPA, 6 LPA. There is a club named SRKR Coding Club, and it helps many students to get out of fear and to understand from the basics. Internships: not many, but only 3rd and 4th-year students are getting internships, not 1st and 2nd-year students.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi in labs is good, and there is always a person who solves any problem that arises in the computers (lab technician available all the time). Classrooms are non-AC, but labs are AC. Canteen is available from early morning to evening 5 PM. Main library is very good and the best place. There is a central library at the starting point of the college, and there are department libraries in each department building. College faculty and management are very supportive towards sports and games, yoga sessions. They even conduct many events related to sports and games. There are two faculty members regarding the sports department.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has supportive faculty, average placements, and good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: I am an AIML student. About 50 percent of students get placed in my course. Here, the same number of students are placed in two or more companies. The top recruiting companies for my course are Infosys, TCS, and Cognizant. These are the top-most and pool recruiters of our college. The top roles offered are system engineer and digital specialist engineer. The lowest package offered is 3 LPA. The average package is offered. The highest package offered is 21 LPA. 30 percent of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure for my course/department regarding labs and classrooms are fine and cool. There is much greenery. A good infrastructure for labs or systems is provided. Whenever needed, we can do system work in our college labs. There is also an Ideal lab in which we can share our ideas and thoughts to implement innovation projects. We can work there with efficient facilities. There will be no efficient Wi-Fi facility. There are good-quality facilities in our hostel. Games and sports are also played here.

content.Infrastructure: My college infrastructure is good. My college has a good auditorium. It offers good computer labs and a good ground. The food in the canteen is also good. We have a good badminton court, a good volleyball court, and a good cricket ground. My college has a three-storey library which contains all the required books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering College.

content.Placements: Ours is the 2027 graduation batch. The highest packages are very rare but are about 50 LPA, the lowest are 3-5 LPA, and the average packages are about 7 LPA. Cognizant and other MNCs like Infosys and TCS are our top recruiting companies. Internships are rare. As I am an AIML student, our roles include AL and ML engineer, RL research engineer, and many others.
content.Infrastructure: The labs and classes are good. The labs are good enough for lab programs and some basic operations, and are not good enough for big projects. However, we have an ideal lab for high computational power. Classrooms are neat, peaceful, and calm. The library is very large and is equipped with lots of books, and it also includes a digital library.

faqs.question: How many seats are available at Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering College for all courses combined?

faqs.question: How can I get into Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering College for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityMCACandidate must have passed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with Mathematics as one of the subject at Intermediate or Degree level with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.
Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply

description: SRKR Engineering College cutoff 2025 is available for admission to B.E. / B.Tech via the AP EAMCET exams. Students can scroll down this page to view the cutoff of various accepted exams for different courses, rounds and categories. A few more updates can be seen in the pointers below:

SRKR Engineering College AP EAMCET Cutoff 2025 has been published for all rounds and categories under both the All India and Home State quota. For the General category candidates belonging to the All India quota, the cutoff range in the last round was 2005 to 27879, wherein B.E. / B.Tech was the hardest course to get admission to for this category.

SRKR Engineering College B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, along with the cutoffs for 2024 and 2023 for various categories and rounds, can be found in this section. As per the last round of AP EAMCET, the hardest course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech for the General AI category, which had the cutoff of 2005.
Students can see the table below to know the cutoff for other categories and quotas.

Students who want admission to Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering College for courses offered via AP EAMCET examination can see the table below to know the important dates for enrolment. Candidates can also download these essential dates as a PDF file for later use.

The Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE) conducts the AP EAMCET exam for admission to BTech, BPharm, and BSc in Agriculture, Bachelor's in Fisheries, and Bachelor's in Horticulture programmes. hostel_campus.college_name: SRKR Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Not excellent but one of the best. Satisfied with faculty. Dissatisfied with classrooms.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi in labs is good, and there is always a person who solves any problem that arises in the computers (lab technician available all the time). Classrooms are non-AC, but labs are AC. Canteen is available from early morning to evening 5 PM. Main library is very good and the best place. There is a central library at the starting point of the college, and there are department libraries in each department building. College faculty and management are very supportive towards sports and games, yoga s...

reviews.review_heading: It has supportive faculty, average placements, and good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure for my course/department regarding labs and classrooms are fine and cool. There is much greenery. A good infrastructure for labs or systems is provided. Whenever needed, we can do system work in our college labs. There is also an Ideal lab in which we can share our ideas and thoughts to implement innovation projects. We can work there with efficient facilities. There will be no efficient Wi-Fi facility. There are good-quality facilities in our hostel. Games and spor...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of facilities provided by my college.
reviews.review_text: My college infrastructure is good. My college has a good auditorium. It offers good computer labs and a good ground. The food in the canteen is also good. We have a good badminton court, a good volleyball court, and a good cricket ground. My college has a three-storey library which contains all the required books.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: All Wi-Fi, labs, classes, and the library are good and excellent. The course and department are decent. The quality of the facilities in our hostel and the quality of food in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are very good, and we are in a good college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The labs and classes are good. The labs are good enough for lab programs and some basic operations, and are not good enough for big projects. However, we have an ideal lab for high computational power. Classrooms are neat, peaceful, and calm. The library is very large and is equipped with lots of books, and it also includes a digital library.

reviews.review_heading: I had one of the best learning experiences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college SRKR is really stunning and built in a very friendly way. Labs are well-organised with systems and AC rooms. Classrooms have broad desks and digital screens. The library is on 3 floors, including labs. In sports, interested individuals get many opportunities.

reviews.review_heading: Learning with fun. A feel good college.
reviews.review_text: The college looks beautiful and peaceful. Coming to the academic infrastructure, like Wi-Fi, labs, and others, they are also well-equipped with power backup, and the Wi-Fi library is too good to be explained. Hostels are hygienic, and we have to compromise a bit with food, but overall, it is good.

reviews.review_heading: Very experienced college.
reviews.review_text: The college area is small but near and clean, as well as convenient. Wi-Fi is provided by the college for lab work and also for personal usage. Classrooms are neat and clean. Coming to the library is the best. Hostels are very hygienic, the food is good, and our canteen is also the best one.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied. Infrastructure is lagging, but the faculty is good.
reviews.review_text: All is okay. Facilities are good, but the infrastructure is a bit lagging. There are old computers that are not up to date. Coming to sports and games, our college encourages as much as possible, and even facilities are being provided to play games. The management is particular about student fitness.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good placements. I am satisfied with the infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Facilities in my college are good. But the hostel is the worst. Food in the hostel mess is very bad. The canteen in the college is good with food, etc. There are many courts to play games here. There is a very good infrastructure for playing. Many tournaments also happen here.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the facilities provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: Regarding infrastructure, it is an old college, so we have to compromise somewhat, but not much. They always try to provide the best facilities to the students. The library is well-equipped with air conditioning and they provide 24/7 Wi-Fi facilities. Regarding the food, some days it is good, but on other days it lies between average to good.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good, but we need to make some more study hours.
reviews.review_text: The department had modern computer laboratories equipped with systems, serving each lab. They had high-speed processors and licensed software required for programming, data analytics, and business system projects. The entire academic block was supported by campus-wide high-speed Wi-Fi, allowing students to access the online learning platform, coding environment, and digital classrooms. Classrooms were normal, with one projector class and a seminar hall for presentations. The central library was ...

reviews.review_heading: College is very good, and the faculty is very friendly with others.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is not at all good. The hostel is located outside of the college. It is different from all hostels. It is very boring, and the timings are very hard and harsh. The rules are very different from other college hostels, and very boring. The hostel is very boring. There are more than a few rules, very lazy rules.

reviews.review_heading: The college offers a balanced campus life with decent placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our CSE department is quite good. Classrooms are clean and spacious. The Wi-Fi works well most of the time. The computer labs have updated systems and enough resources for practical work. The library is also helpful, with good seating and access to reference books. The hostel facilities are decent. Rooms are maintained properly, and basic needs like RO water and washing areas are available. The mess food is average. Some days are good, some days not so great, but manageabl...

reviews.review_heading: College has great infrastructure and faculty support, but placement opportunities are limited.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the college. A separate block is allocated for the central library and digital library. Students can access those resources with a library card. Labs are equipped with modern equipment and qualified technicians. Classrooms are equipped with digital TVs and projector facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, decent placements, but needs stronger industry exposure.

review_content.Placements: Placement percentage is 75%. The highest package is 9.50 LPA. Average package is 4.50 LPA. Top recruiters (CSE) are Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, Chegg India, and BYJU's. 70% of students got internships in companies like IBM and Wipro. Top roles offered are software engineer/developer, system engineer, programmer analyst, project engineer, and cloud engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has full campus Wi-Fi, modern classrooms, more than 20 labs, 30,000+ books in library, and digital access. It has well-equipped mechanical shops, seminar halls, and 2000-seats auditorium. Separate hostels are available for boys and girls (AC/non-AC), furnished rooms, Wi-Fi, gym, good electricity/water. Mess and canteen food quality is average but hygienic. Canteen is available for variety. We have on-campus clinic, 24X7 ambulance, and tie-ups with nearby hospitals. It has courts (basketball, volleyball, badminton, tennis), gym, and indoor games. There are more than 20 extra buses for transport.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: An average engineering college.

review_content.Placements: I am from the B.Tech CSE batch (2022-26) with about 120 students. In our senior batch 72 percent students got placed. The highest package was 12 LPA, the lowest was 3 LPA and the average was 5.5 LPA. Top recruiters included Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, Cognizant, Accenture and Tech Mahindra along with a few startups. 65 percent secured internships through campus or off-campus drives in companies like Infosys, Wipro and tech startups focusing on software and web/app development. Common roles offered were software engineer, associate engineer, system analyst, QA engineer, and data analyst.

Food is provided on a weekly basis, with different food on different days.

reviews.review_text: CSE department has Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, and a central library with digital resources. Hostel facilities are decent with furnished rooms, medical support, sports facilities, and canteen/mess food of average but manageable quality.

Food is provided on a weekly basis, with different food on different days.

reviews.review_heading: When entering college, one must steadily keep gaining knowledge and skills!

reviews.review_heading: Decent placement, needs upgrade.

reviews.review_heading: UCER - United College of Engineering and Research.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a great infrastructure and a huge land area. The area where it is situated is some how busy and have some trees. Every classroom have AC and a projector facility that makes it easier and comfortable for students to focus on their studies.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college with normal placement.

It also includes that the campus consists of a digital lab equipped with Wi-Fi, computers, and a smart board for a better and practical learning experience. Although the hostel is within the campus but it is handled by Royal Parad...

reviews.review_heading: Good college located in the Knowledge Park 3 area.

The hostel is well-furnished with Wi-Fi.

There are big classrooms. One class has 60 students. There is a good and knowledgeable environment in the library. It is perfect.

The Gandhi Institute for Education and Technology course fee ranges between INR 79,500 to 2,88,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    Gandhi Institute for Education and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognized Institute.UG DiplomaCandidate who have passed 10th standard examination declared equivalent by BSE, Odisha can also apply.
The lower age limit is 14 years and there is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed bachelor degree or equivalent in the relevant field of engineering and technology with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed bachelor degree of minimum 3 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category.MCACandidate must have completed BCA/ Bachelor Degree in Computer Science Engineering or equivalent Degree with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
OR
Candidate who have completed B.Sc./ B.Com./ B.A. with Mathematics at 10+2 Level or at Graduation Level can also apply.
45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category.After 10th DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/equivalent conducted by BSE, Odisha/equivalent are eligible to apply.
The lower age limit is 14 years and there is no upper age limit.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good, and it is ranked 53rd in India for placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is Wi-Fi enabled, and classrooms are also fully AC. The hostel food is also good. The mess provides 3 times hygienic food for students. The college has its own atm medical facilities and many clubs. The college also has a central library.

reviews.review_heading: Average placements but best faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Talking about the infrastructure then I will say that it is very good whether the infrastructure of the college buildings or the hostel buildings. The college has one main building which is of 7 floors having all different types of required facilities like libraries, classrooms, placement cells, auditorium, seminar halls, offices, and all other facilities. Talking about the hostel then there are 8-10 buildings, especially for hostel, where each hostel is on 3 floors and 50 rooms on each floor an...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely a better college because it is value for money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent, with very good lab facilities and a well-equipped library with many subscriptions to research and journal websites. The hostel provided by the college is also good. They maintain proper cleanliness, and the meals provided are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The location is very attractive.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is average and the canteen here is also average. Faculty members are good but children mostly study in rooms. I mean self-study is the best thing about college. The location is in an absolutely quiet area and it is in a very beautiful hill area. There is no destruction. There is also a medical facility nearby, there is a government facility, and children are taken there in case of any kind of injuries.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: According to the fee, the hostel is very good. Overall good facilities. The college is very good in terms of money. All the teachers are very helpful. All the staff helps a lot, the environment is fine but it is not that good. There might be a bit of a language problem.

reviews.review_heading: Something about GIET College.
reviews.review_text: Yes, Wi-Fi is available only on the college campus but not in hostels, which is the worst thing about my college. The labs are okay, but the lab materials are outdated. There is a central library in this college, with a capacity of 70 students who can sit at a time. It also has facilities like a digital library, and books and journals are available. Hostel food is okay but needs improvement. Sports infrastructure is good, but there is a lack of sports components like balls and nets, etc.

reviews.review_heading: My college was good. Each and every moment was memorable .
reviews.review_text: In the college, the labs are updated, and the equipment is very good. Classrooms are very big in size. The canteen food is very tasty. But the hostel food is not as good as compared to outer canteen food. Inside the campus there is a huge playground, a badminton space, and a basketball space also.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the course fees and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has very good infrastructure. Many facilities, like labs, smart classes, and many books and journals, are available in the college library. The quality of food is average, and our college provides water for drinking. In a week our college provides non-veg 3 times.

reviews.review_heading: Those who cannot afford high price college can try here but recommend by me.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for the course/department is like okay I can rate it 3.5 out of 5. The classrooms are not so big but the labs are good same for the library. I am not a hosteler but the hostel is okay and the food is sometimes good and sometimes bad.

reviews.review_heading: Education is the way to success.
reviews.review_text: In our college campus, we have a beautiful garden next to the college with a fountain in it. There are various departments like B.Tech, M.Tech, MBA, MCA, Diploma, BCA, 12th, B.Sc., etc. College provides good and decent food service with two canteens for boys and one for girls. College also has big cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is the perfect college on my wishlist.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good, and the food provided is hygienic and tasty. Two options, veg and non-veg, are available weekly. Vehicles are provided for medical emergencies for hostelers. There is a playground as well as badminton court.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to learn from the best, come here.
reviews.review_text: Good clean rooms are available in the hostel. The warden’s behaviour is good. A single hostel room has four beds, two fans and the two study tables along with four chairs for comfortable learning. The environment is clean and green. You even get an attached bathroom for an individual room which is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gandhi Institute for Education and Technology.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is average according to this fee. The quality of the food is also quite average. And the sports facilities are very good here. If you have a lot of financial problems and you want to study at a high level, then you will not find a better college than this one.

reviews.review_heading: The best colleges in Bhubaneswar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and the canteen facilities are provided to the students three times a day, including weekends too. The quality of the food is good but needs some improvement in terms of taste, and electricity and water supply are also available all weekdays.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college; placement is low as compared to other government colleges.
reviews.review_text:
In college, Wi-Fi is available, and the lab is good, but some systems are not working. The library is good.
In hostels, facilities are not good. There is no water supply 24 hours a day, only in the morning and evening. It is the big problem I face, and other things are good. Bad foods are given.

This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. There are other fee components that candidates need to pay at the time of admission. faqs.question: What is the fees for MBA at GNIOT?

faqs.answer: A:    The Postgraduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) programme at GNIOT Institute of Management Studies (GIMS) in Greater Noida follows a comprehensive fee structure, amounting to Rs 7,38,000 for the entire course. This sum is divided across the four semesters of the program, reflecting a semester-based payment system.First-year students are required to fulfill their financial obligations by remitting the stipulated fees on or before November 20. This ensures timely processing and facilitates the smooth functioning of academic and administrative processes for the initial academic year. It is imperative for students to adhere to this deadline to avoid any complications or interruptions in their academic journey.For second-year students, the deadline for fee payment is set for August 20. This provides a window during the summer break for returning students to manage their financial responsibilities before the commencement of the subsequent academic year. It is essential for these students to mark this date in their calendars and make timely arrangements for the due payments.It is crucial to note that this information is current as of the date of our conversation, and students or prospective candidates are advised to verify the fee structure and deadlines on the official website of GNIOT Institute of Management Studies. Institutions may update policies, fees, or deadlines, and staying informed is essential for individuals associated with or aspiring to join the institute.Prospect

reviews_list.review_title: GNIOT offers a good campus, supportive faculty, and average placement opportunities.

review_content.Placements: GNIOT has an active placement cell that invites many companies yearly. In recent drives, over 300-400 recruiters visited, with around 700+ students placed across programs. The highest salary has gone up to around 70 LPA (international) and domestic packages around 27 LPA, while the average package is around 6-7 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HP, Cognizant, and many more, offering roles in IT, management, finance, and analytics.
review_content.Infrastructure: GNIOT has a large, modern campus with AC classrooms, smart boards, labs for all departments, and a big library with thousands of books and e-resources. There are separate hostels for boys and girls, sports grounds, an auditorium, cafeteria, medical facilities, Wi-Fi, and transport services. Overall, good infrastructure for study and campus life.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Let's talk about GNIOT Greater Noida.

review_content.Placements: College history on a placement basis is not that great, placements are just average. Almost 80% students are placed, but all those are mass recruitment companies taking students on packages of 3-5 LPA. For placements, you have to work hard and try on your own if you need better.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college area is not that vast, but the infrastructure is good. Classes are equipped with AC and smart projectors. Hostel facility is also available. Three canteens are in the college. Sports facilities are also available in the college. The college is also equipped with a music room. Which is in gips.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: The GNIOT College, the only way to success for you.

review_content.Placements: The passing out batch has got a very great placement in various companies with a good package. The average package is around 600,000-700,000. Companies like Zomato, Tata, and Boast come to campus. The college even provides internships and hackathons with great prize money.
review_content.Infrastructure: Talking honestly, it is not worth it. The building is old, the food is not tasty, the Wi-Fi network is poor, and the hostel timings are very strict. The price is quite high. You can get non-campus hostels or PGs at a cheaper rate with more facilities and fewer rules and regulations.

overview_faqs.question: Is GNIOT Institute of Professional Studies good?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, GNIOT Institute of Professional Studies is quite good and provides various facilities for students. The college even offers scholarships and placement assistance for students.

review_summary.college_name: GNIOT Greater Noida Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: They give placement, good faculty, they help, so you can go for it.

content.Placements: Not much student percentage are placed, but this year in BBA, 200 plus companies have come for interviews. If you failed, they will train you on how to sit in interviews. The highest is 8 LPA in BBA, the lowest is 2 LPA. Companies include Bajaj Finance, Agile, etc. There are more. Around 80 percent placements in BBA, B. Tech, PGDM, BCA, MBA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. Lifts are there, AC in almost every class. Teachers are also good at teaching. Labs are okay, library they have made quite good. Hostel rooms were good, food was average. Sports not happens much, games are less, only in first year happens.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Only for management students.

content.Placements: GNIOT placement is average, according to me. The average package is 2 LPA-4 LPA, and the highest package is 12 LPA. The main thing is that recruiters do not come from the big companies. The company that comes for placement is small, and almost all the students get the internships.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good and fully air-conditioned but the internet connectivity is too poor. There is a separate library and lab for each department. The college grounds are not too big but they are decent and the cafeteria is also good with a reasonable price.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: GNIOT offers a good campus, supportive faculty, and average placement opportunities.

content.Placements: GNIOT has an active placement cell that invites many companies yearly. In recent drives, over 300-400 recruiters visited, with around 700+ students placed across programs. The highest salary has gone up to around 70 LPA (international) and domestic packages around 27 LPA, while the average package is around 6-7 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HP, Cognizant, and many more, offering roles in IT, management, finance, and analytics.
content.Infrastructure: GNIOT has a large, modern campus with AC classrooms, smart boards, labs for all departments, and a big library with thousands of books and e-resources. There are separate hostels for boys and girls, sports grounds, an auditorium, cafeteria, medical facilities, Wi-Fi, and transport services. Overall, good infrastructure for study and campus life.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Let's talk about GNIOT Greater Noida.

content.Placements: College history on a placement basis is not that great, placements are just average. Almost 80% students are placed, but all those are mass recruitment companies taking students on packages of 3-5 LPA. For placements, you have to work hard and try on your own if you need better.
content.Infrastructure: The college area is not that vast, but the infrastructure is good. Classes are equipped with AC and smart projectors. Hostel facility is also available. Three canteens are in the college. Sports facilities are also available in the college. The college is also equipped with a music room. Which is in gips.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The GNIOT College, the only way to success for you.

content.Placements: The passing out batch has got a very great placement in various companies with a good package. The average package is around 600,000-700,000. Companies like Zomato, Tata, and Boast come to campus. The college even provides internships and hackathons with great prize money.
content.Infrastructure: Talking honestly, it is not worth it. The building is old, the food is not tasty, the Wi-Fi network is poor, and the hostel timings are very strict. The price is quite high. You can get non-campus hostels or PGs at a cheaper rate with more facilities and fewer rules and regulations.

admission_overview.college_name: GNIOT Greater Noida Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: GNIOT Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: GNIOT Greater Noidaadmissions 2025 are open. GNIOT offers popular courses in the field of Technical and Management courses. It is approved by AICTE, the Ministry of HRD, Government of India. Also, it is affiliated withDr. APJ Abdul Kalam Technical University, Lucknow. Candidates can also choose courses in streams like Computer Applications, Science, Commerce, etc.GNIOTGreater Noida conducts admission on the basis of both merit and entrance exam scores. The popularly accepted entrance exams are CAT, MAT, CMAT, JEE Main, CUET UG, etc. The final seat allotment is done based on UPTAC Counselling process. Candidates can get in touch with the admission department and seek further procedures for admission in 2025. Read on the following article to know more about GNIOT course admission 2025.

GNIOT Greater Noida admission is carried out based on the basic eligibility criteria and scores of various national-level entrance exams for respective courses. Candidates can check the GNIOT popular courses in the table below:
UG degree with 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ST)
Class 12 with 45% aggregate with Physics, Maths and Chemistry/ Biotech/ Biology/ Tech. Vocation (40% aggregate in SC/ST)
Class 12 with 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ST category)
UG degree with 50% aggregate BCA/ BSc/ BCom/ BA with Mathematics as subject
Class 12 with 45% aggregate in PCB as subjects
Note:This information is taken from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

GNIOT course admission to UG & PG programmes is both merit and entrance-based. Candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria to get admission to various courses. GNIOT admission process consists of various steps. Find below the complete details aboutGNIOT course admissions 2025:

Candidates seeking admission to PGDM course at GNIOT must fill an online application form in either online or offline mode. Along with that, candidates have to pay an application fee ofINR 1,200either through credit card, debit card or net banking.

GNIOT course admissions such as BBA, BCA, MCA, etc are based on academic records of the previous qualifying exam, followed by UPTAC counselling. Furthermore, for admission to the BTech course, candidates either need to qualify for the JEE Main/ CUET UG or GNIOT Online Test.

Similarly, GNIOT Noida admission for PGDM courses is entirely entrance-based. Eligible candidates are selected based on scores of either CMAT/ CAT/XAT/MAT/GMAT and GIMS Aptitude Test (GAT). The final selection is based on the performance of candidates in Group Discussions and Personal Interview rounds. GIMS admission panel as appointed by the director for the particular academic year. The shortlisting of the application forms shall be done based on following parameters primarily:1. Consistency of academic record.2. Versatility of academic records.3. Relevant work experience for the programme (if any).
After the selection round, shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Candidates must pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

description: GNIOT cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about GNIOT UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

GNIOT cutoff 2025 was released via GGSIPU entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 217947 and 218092 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 217947, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 127300.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 217947.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

GNIOT offers admission to various PG courses based on CUET PG scores followed by round-wise counselling. The university releases the merit lists for candidates who qualify for the cutoff. As per the GNIOT cutoff 2024, the Round 1 closing score for the Master of Computer Applications (MCA) is 13552, which is the highest score of all the PG courses. The next highest score is 9745 for Master of Business Administration (MBA) for the General category students belonging to All India Quota. Candidates

GNIOT accepts CUET PG scores for admission to postgraduate courses including MBA and MCA. According to the GNIOT cutoff 2024, the closing rank for Master of Computer Applications (MCA) is 6200, and for Master of Business Administration (MBA) is 9745. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table given below to check out the CUET PG cutoff for the previous year to get clarity of the past year's trends:
GNIOT accept CUET scores for admission to Postgraduate courses. Check GNIOT CUET PG important dates 2024 from the table below:
Tabulated below is GNIOT 2024 cutoff year-wise PDFs in downloadable formats:

GNIOT offers a two-year full-time MBA course. Admission to this course is based on candidates' performance in various National and state-level exams. Candidates aspiring for GNIOT must have a valid score in either of CAT or UPCAT to fulfil the eligibility for further admission rounds. As per the GNIOT cutoff 2022 for MBA, the minimum cutoff required for CAT was 25 percentile. Also, considering the UPCAT cutoff 2020, candidates must have an overall rank of 4038 for MBA admission in the General ca
Listed below are the important GNIOT CAT cutoff 2024 dates. Candidates are advised to check this section regularly as the dates can be revised time-to-time:
GNIOT MBA admissions 2024 are scheduled to commence soon based on candidates' CAT results. Find below the consolidated cutoff PDF for admission to the GNIOT MBA programme based on CAT and UPCAT:

As the GNIOT UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. Students can refer to the table below to find the Round 1 and Last Round closing cutoff ranks for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations available at GNIOT.
During last round B.Tech. in Information Technology proved to be the toughest for this category, with the closing cutoff being .
In this section, students can see UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations.

For 2025, in the last round, the top three most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech. in Information Technology, followed by B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, and B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering, with the closing ranks of 1343902, and , respectively.

For admission to GNIOT for B.E. / B.Tech students have to clear the UPTAC exam and attain valid ranks to qualify for a seat at this institute. Students can see the table below to know the important dates for admission to Greater Noida Institute of Technology.

Students who want to know the UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for various rounds can refer to the table below. Candidates also have the option to view the cutoff data for the previous two years, i.e., 2024 and 2023. These cutoff lists can also be downloaded for later use.
In this section, students can know the cutoff for 2025, 2024 and 2023 for various courses, categories, and quotas.

For the General AI category, the cutoff in the last round was 217947 for BTech CSE course. In 2024 and 2023, the cutoff for the same course was 151726 and 102880, respectively. After analysing these ranks, we can say that the competition for the aforementioned course has been declining.

hostel_campus.college_name: GNIOT Greater Noida Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Well equipped Conference hall and Seminar hall

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by GNIOT Institute of Professional StudiesReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: They give placement, good faculty, they help, so you can go for it.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. Lifts are there, AC in almost every class. Teachers are also good at teaching. Labs are okay, library they have made quite good. Hostel rooms were good, food was average. Sports not happens much, games are less, only in first year happens.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by GNIOT Institute of Professional StudiesReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Only for management students.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good and fully air-conditioned but the internet connectivity is too poor. There is a separate library and lab for each department. The college grounds are not too big but they are decent and the cafeteria is also good with a reasonable price.

reviews.review_heading: GNIOT offers a good campus, supportive faculty, and average placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: GNIOT has a large, modern campus with AC classrooms, smart boards, labs for all departments, and a big library with thousands of books and e-resources. There are separate hostels for boys and girls, sports grounds, an auditorium, cafeteria, medical facilities, Wi-Fi, and transport services. Overall, good infrastructure for study and campus life.

reviews.review_heading: Let's talk about GNIOT Greater Noida.
reviews.review_text: The college area is not that vast, but the infrastructure is good. Classes are equipped with AC and smart projectors. Hostel facility is also available. Three canteens are in the college. Sports facilities are also available in the college. The college is also equipped with a music room. Which is in gips.

reviews.review_heading: The GNIOT College, the only way to success for you.
reviews.review_text: Talking honestly, it is not worth it. The building is old, the food is not tasty, the Wi-Fi network is poor, and the hostel timings are very strict. The price is quite high. You can get non-campus hostels or PGs at a cheaper rate with more facilities and fewer rules and regulations.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Greater Noida Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: According to me, the infrastructure is okay. Wi-Fi is good and has a speed of more than 100 Mbps. Every class has its own Wi-Fi network. The institution also has a particular Wi-Fi. The library is good, but they don't have as many books as they mentioned on the website. However, it can be managed. Hostel food is average according to my friends and me.

reviews.review_heading: Good college to learn and improve.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average but decent, still needs more improvement. Wi-Fi is not always available for students, labs are decent in every classroom. Everything works fine, but they need better bathroom facilities. Some buildings are really old but strong.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by GNIOT Institute of Professional StudiesReviewed on 8 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is well-known and good.
reviews.review_text: There is a winner hostel facility, but it is quite costly, so most students prefer PGs or low-rate hotels. The classrooms are good, and the most amazing thing is the freshers’ party of our college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is supportive and good.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very good and world-class. All facilities are provided in the college. The mess provides good food and meals. The hostel facility is also good. All major sports facilities are provided. All games are also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by GNIOT Institute of Professional StudiesReviewed on 3 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: GNIOT is not for campus life, and admission is too easy.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is okay. The buildings are old, and the ground is a little small; it is also a little crowded. Hostels are too expensive compared to any other college in Greater Noida. There is no fun life here, and there is too much restriction due to the 75 percent attendance criteria.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by GNIOT Institute of Professional StudiesReviewed on 3 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of GNIOT Institute of Professional Studies.
reviews.review_text: The college is very well-maintained and designed. It is equipped with all the necessary facilities like AC classrooms, free Wi-Fi in labs, and smart classrooms with a projector. Classrooms remain very clean and well-maintained. It has a library which is open all the time and has all the resource books, academic as well as personal growth books. It also has 2 computer labs. The hostel has 4 floors plus a ground floor. It also has a gym, a badminton court, a canteen, a very large mess area, free u...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by GNIOT Institute of Management StudiesReviewed on 30 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Very good, better opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are very good, and the college also has 2 to 3 canteens and medical facilities. Also, here students are free to enjoy their studies and college life. I prefer the students who want to join college in Greater Noida, as this college is the best opportunity for them.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by GNIOT Institute of Management StudiesReviewed on 28 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Gims also organizes events and extracurricular activities annual fest.
reviews.review_text: It has one of the best infrastructures in Greater Noida. It has all the facilities like a smartboard, Wi-Fi, libraries, a conference room, a common room, a reading room, a student computer lab, a hostel for boys and girls, and a 24/7 canteen facility available on the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by GNIOT Institute of Management StudiesReviewed on 27 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My honest review of GNIOT.
reviews.review_text: The hostel at GNIOT is clean, safe, and comfortable for students. Basic facilities like Wi-Fi, mess, cleanliness, and security are maintained. The environment is student-friendly. It helps in focusing on studies and development. Clean drinking water is there.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by GNIOT Institute of Management StudiesReviewed on 27 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Raw and real experience of the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. There are sections for the 1st year that are running together at the same time. We have a computer lab with a capacity of 80 students. Our college has a seminar hall with an occupancy of 200+ students at once and a lawn space. Classes are fully air-conditioned and have fully smart classrooms.

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Management, Computer Applications, Pharmacy, etc.

At the UG level, Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology offers BTech and BPharm courses to students. At the PG level, the college offers MBA, , , and other courses to students. The college also provides value-added programmes to students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology and their respective eligibility and Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology fee structure:

faqs.question: What documents are required admission to various courses at Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    SRMS College Bareilly offers a total of 72 seats for its BPharma course. Candidates willing to secure BPharma seats must qualify for the CUET exam and participate in counselling for 85% seat allocation. However, seats are also offered based on the class 12 exam merit for the remaining 15% and vacant/lapsed seats. Find below the seat bifurcation of the BPharma course:CoursesSeatsBachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma. Lateral Entry)12Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.)60
faqs.question: What is the BPharma seat intake at SRMS College?

faqs.answer: A:    In order to apply for BPharma course the candidate need to meet the last educational qualification. Aspirants should complete Class 12 with 55% aggregate in PCM/Biology/Biotech). For Lateral Entry, the candidate should complete Diploma in pharmacy with 60% aggregate.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for BPharma at Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Shri Ram Murti Engineering College Bareilly accepts JEE Main scores. A total of 85% seat intake of all branches is allotted according to the merit list of JEE Main through online counselling. Similarly,  15% seats of total intake & vacant/lapsed seats in all branches are allocated based on merit of Class 12 marks (with 60% aggregate marks in PCM).

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure, but the faculty has less knowledge about the subject.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% - 80% of our previous batch got placed, but mostly off campus. Packages range from 3 LPA (the lowest) to 12 LPA (the highest) with an average of 5-6 LPA. Top recruiters on the campus were Co-Forage. Many students secure internships in IT firms as developers, analysts, and intern engineers.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our department has Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, labs (some of the computers do not work), and a library. Hostels are clean with Wi-Fi, decent mess food, canteen options, medical care, and sports facilities that are good both indoors and outdoors, ensuring overall student well-being.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it is a good college with good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Placement is nice if students really work for it, but the college also provides various courses that are good. The average package was 3 LPA, and most were placed. They also provide internships that are really beneficial and can help in the growth of the student. Hence, overall, the impression of placement is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, old, but regularly maintained. The greenery is very pretty and mesmerizing. Classes are well equipped with AC and projectors, and labs are fully air-conditioned, with cleanliness maintained. Various facilities are available for sports, such as a huge football and cricket ground, along with volleyball, basketball, and squash courts.

overview_faqs.question: Is Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology approved?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technolog is approved by approved by AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education) and offers programmes in affiliation with the AKTU - Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University (UPTU). To get admission to this AICTE-approved college, candidates must have valid scores in accepted entrance exams.

overview_faqs.question: Why should I pursue MCA course at Shri Ram Murti Engineering College, Bareilly?
overview_faqs.answer: MCA full form is Master of Computer Applications. It is a two-year postgraduate program that focuses on Mastering in computer applications. It is designed for students aspiring to build a career in computer applications and software development. Students can check the list of reasons to pursue MCA course from Shri Ram Murti Engineering College Bareilly:It provides a strong foundation in both theoretical and practical aspects of computer science, preparing students for advanced roles in technology and innovation.For BCA graduates, pursuing an MCA degree enhances their career prospects.MCA graduates and Engineering graduates are usually hired for the same job profiles.The average salary of an entry-level programmer ranges between INR 3.8 LPA to INR 9 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Not at all value for money.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities aren't good enough, not even half of the students in the batch are placed, and those who are placed are hired by a mass recruiter. The average package is 3 LPA, and mostly students are placed on that package. These states are just for attracting newbies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decent, and the hostel rooms are good in comparison to other colleges. The labs are also good, but the system that students use is outdated. The mess food in the hostel is average but edible. The campus has grounds for various sports, which is the only thing I love in this college, you have separate football and cricket grounds, which you can access whenever you want.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College is good for topper students.

content.Placements: Approximately 70 to 80% of students are placed in a particular batch on an average package of 3 to 5 LPA. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the lowest package is 3.5 LPA. Around 10% students secured internships through the college, but there are no good internships.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious, well ventilated, and equipped with projectors/whiteboards. The library is also good and well mentioned, and only old books are available for students. Computer labs are good, they have all out date setup and software as well as hardware.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure, but the faculty has less knowledge about the subject.

content.Placements: Around 70% - 80% of our previous batch got placed, but mostly off campus. Packages range from 3 LPA (the lowest) to 12 LPA (the highest) with an average of 5-6 LPA. Top recruiters on the campus were Co-Forage. Many students secure internships in IT firms as developers, analysts, and intern engineers.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, labs (some of the computers do not work), and a library. Hostels are clean with Wi-Fi, decent mess food, canteen options, medical care, and sports facilities that are good both indoors and outdoors, ensuring overall student well-being.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is a good college with good faculty members.

content.Placements: Placement is nice if students really work for it, but the college also provides various courses that are good. The average package was 3 LPA, and most were placed. They also provide internships that are really beneficial and can help in the growth of the student. Hence, overall, the impression of placement is good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, old, but regularly maintained. The greenery is very pretty and mesmerizing. Classes are well equipped with AC and projectors, and labs are fully air-conditioned, with cleanliness maintained. Various facilities are available for sports, such as a huge football and cricket ground, along with volleyball, basketball, and squash courts.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Best college for scholarships (government and in-college scholarships).

content.Placements: The college has a good placement record, with an average package of 5 LPA. The highest package is about 35 LPA, and the lowest package is around 3 LPA. There are 99% actual placements, a good placement cell, and good contacts. The college also provides good guidance during placement sessions, and placements are increasing every year.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi connectivity is okay; the hostel is neat and clean and provides all facilities, with good food and snacks. CS, IT, mechanical, and AIML are almost famous courses and branches. It is famous for CS-themed placements and is enough for enjoying college life.

admission_process.title: Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology Bareilly Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology admission 2025is currently open. The college offers courses, such as BTech, BBA, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. To get admission toShri Ram Murti Engineering College Bareilly, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The college offers more than 12 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Business and Management, etc. The application process at Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology is conducted online. The college is affiliated withAKTU. Read the following article to know more aboutSRMSCE course admission2025.

The mode of study for various courses is full-time. To enrol for various course admissions, candidates must complete the last educational qualification set by the college. For BTech course, 85% of seats in all the branches are allocated to the merit list of JEE Main. For the rest of the 15% seats, all the branches are allocated based on merit of Class 12 and brief object assessment. Read on to know more aboutSRMSCET course admissions2025.

Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology courses' admissions are based on the entrance exam as per respective courses. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularShri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology courses:
Note: *The candidate having valid score card of GPAT is exempted from entrance test conducted by Dr. A.P.J.Abdual Kalam Technical University, Lucknow.

Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology admission process includes entrance exam scores for various courses. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at SRMSCET is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to various programs, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://myportal.srms.ac.in/onlineregistration. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.

The institute considers various entrance exam scores such as JEE Main, CAT, XAT, etc, for admission to the BTech, MBA among courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for the final selection.

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theShri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

description: Shri Ram Murti Engineering College Bareilly cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Shri Ram Murti Engineering College Bareilly UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Shri Ram Murti Engineering College Bareilly cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Shri Ram Murti Engineering College Bareilly BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 891326 and 1314068 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Elect

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 891326 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 629612 in 2023.

Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. hostel_campus.college_name: Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Hostels are equipped with single, double and triple seated rooms and facilities available includes separate mess for boys and girls which provide vegetarian food only, common rooms with facilities of Indoor games like Table Tennis, Chess, Carrom, etc, and with cable connection, 15 hours library facility, facility for outdoor games like Volleyball, Basketball, Cricket, Hockey, Football, Squash Court, Badminton Court, Lawn Tennis and a running track is provided.

library.description: Centralized digital library and 8 departmental libraries with 46006 books, 11965 titles, 3413 online e-journals, printed national and international journals along with reprographic, lamination and spiral binding service with 15 hours Library facility

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Football Ground, Squash Court, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Chess Boards, Carom Boards, Hockey Field, Table Tennis, Billiards, Kho- Kho, Squash Court

library.description: Centralized digital library and 8 departmental libraries with 46006 books, 11965 titles, 3413 online e-journals, printed national and international journals along with reprographic, lamination and spiral binding service with 15 hours Library facility

hostel.description: Hostels are equipped with single, double and triple seated rooms and facilities available includes separate mess for boys and girls which provide vegetarian food only, common rooms with facilities of Indoor games like Table Tennis, Chess, Carrom, etc, and with cable connection, 15 hours library facility, facility for outdoor games like Volleyball, Basketball, Cricket, Hockey, Football, Squash Court, Badminton Court, Lawn Tennis and a running track is provided.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Football Ground, Squash Court, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Chess Boards, Carom Boards, Hockey Field, Table Tennis, Billiards, Kho- Kho, Squash Court

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Language Lab

reviews.review_heading: Not at all value for money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent, and the hostel rooms are good in comparison to other colleges. The labs are also good, but the system that students use is outdated. The mess food in the hostel is average but edible. The campus has grounds for various sports, which is the only thing I love in this college, you have separate football and cricket grounds, which you can access whenever you want.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for topper students.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious, well ventilated, and equipped with projectors/whiteboards. The library is also good and well mentioned, and only old books are available for students. Computer labs are good, they have all out date setup and software as well as hardware.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, but the faculty has less knowledge about the subject.
reviews.review_text: Our department has Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, labs (some of the computers do not work), and a library. Hostels are clean with Wi-Fi, decent mess food, canteen options, medical care, and sports facilities that are good both indoors and outdoors, ensuring overall student well-being.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college with good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, old, but regularly maintained. The greenery is very pretty and mesmerizing. Classes are well equipped with AC and projectors, and labs are fully air-conditioned, with cleanliness maintained. Various facilities are available for sports, such as a huge football and cricket ground, along with volleyball, basketball, and squash courts.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for scholarships (government and in-college scholarships).
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connectivity is okay; the hostel is neat and clean and provides all facilities, with good food and snacks. CS, IT, mechanical, and AIML are almost famous courses and branches. It is famous for CS-themed placements and is enough for enjoying college life.

reviews.review_heading: It provides a disciplined and focused academic environment.
reviews.review_text: The campus has decent infrastructure with well-equipped labs, AC classrooms, a big library, a canteen, a multipurpose complex, and clean surroundings. Hostels are well-maintained, with good security, Wi-Fi, and hygienic food. Overall, it is comfortable for students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty and overall environment.
reviews.review_text: Nice infrastructure and facilities are available, including a volleyball court, a basketball court, a huge cricket and football ground. Nature around the campus is also very nice and has beautiful flowers that enhance the beauty of the place. Classes are well-equipped with AC.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review for SRMS from a third-year student.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are pretty decent. Labs have decent desktops for coding while all the labs have Wi-Fi for smooth study. Classrooms are smaller in size but have air conditioning. Library is good in our college with a lot of books which can be issued for a week and then re-issue to make our studies smooth. Hostels are decent to live in. The food provided is good to eat but not everyone may like it. The sports facility is the best among all the colleges in Bareilly.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Bareilly region for sure.
reviews.review_text: For B.Tech students, particularly there is a Wi-Fi facility available for all the hostelers. Labs have updated computer systems with Windows 11 and latest-gen processors. AC classrooms and a huge library with a variety of books to learn. Decent facilities in hostel, good water supply, decent food quality in mess and canteen as well. Good medical facilities, as SRMS Trust owns SRMS Medical College. All types of sports, such as volleyball courts, football ground, dedicated cricket stadium, basketb...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the facilities and safety. Placement in recent years are bad, but teachers are great.
reviews.review_text: It's secure, I believe, with very strict rules and regulations. The network can be very poor. The computer systems are old and not in great condition; not every department has ACs (my department also doesn't). Food quality is average in the hostel; I've stayed there occasionally for events and stuff, so I know.

reviews.review_heading: Join if you want to be disciplined.
reviews.review_text: As compared to other colleges in our district, it’s quite good, but I can’t say it’s the best. There are a number of issues with the server or website they use. Even in infrastructure, the campus isn’t big enough. Also, the sports arena, when it comes to football, is small.

reviews.review_heading: It has excellent academics, strong placements, and a vibrant campus.
reviews.review_text: Labs for the CSE course are well-equipped, and classrooms are decent. Hostels provide the basic necessities and are kept clean. The mess food is average and can get monotonous. Wi-Fi connectivity in the hostel blocks can be unreliable at times.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review that will help us decide on our future college.
reviews.review_text: SRMS has a good infrastructure. It has a clean campus with a lot of trees and greenery. It has highly cleaned washrooms. Good classrooms are equipped with AC. It has its own dairy and mess. It doesn't use any onions or garlic in the mess food. The mess food quality is okay.

reviews.review_heading: It has great seniors and average placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is big with a great infrastructure. But it is all white. It feels boring. Classrooms have projectors and blackboards. The canteen is average. A dispensary is also available there. Sports, games, and everything is available there. The library is available, which is free. Food is average in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: The placements are not at all satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is outdated. One of the most disappointing aspects of my college experience has been the severely lacking infrastructure. While the institution markets itself as modern and very cute, the reality is completely different. Basic facilities like functioning projectors, reliable internet, and proper computing software are either unavailable or poorly maintained.

There are also sports rooms available, and a badminton and volleyball court is also available.

reviews_list.review_title: This is a good college(SMEC).

review_content.Placements: Almost 75% students are placed in our course. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the lowest package is 3LPA. The top companies that are recruiting are Google, Microsoft, and Amazon. Almost 90% got internships from our course. The top roles were web developers and full-stack developers.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities were not bad, there were fully spaced labs and classrooms. The library had a lot of collections of books that were helpful. faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.
