review_summary.college_name: St. Martin's Engineering College (SMEC Secunderabad) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college has absolutely good staff, hostels, and a library.

content.Placements: Placements are good enough and depend on our skills. The highest package offered by the college is 60 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: I am not a college hosteler, but my friends are. The hostel is not 10/10, but the safety is good. We can’t go outside without our parents, so it feels secure. The staff and food are also good. Labs and Wi-Fi are not that great, but the systems are still working. The Wi-Fi has a good network strength.
content.Faculty: Faculty give their 100 percent and are professional, providing all notes and PDFs. They generally treat students well, but some faculty lack professionalism and handle students poorly.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really, I'm so happy because of the weather.

content.Placements: 25 LPA is the highest package, and every year, nearly 1000 members get placements. So many companies visit our college, like Infosys, Google and many MNC companies. Our college offered so many courses they including CSE, ECE, EEE, ME, IT, AI &ML.
content.Infrastructure: My course is ECE, which is very good. And so many laboratories are there in our college, and so many classrooms. Our college offered so many games like kabaddi, kho-kho, cricket, volleyball, carrom board, chess, basketball, table tennis &our college canteen food is of very good quality and tasty.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is considered to be a Tier 2 college.

content.Placements: Regarding CSE, the placements are comparatively lower than those of the other Mallareddy colleges. AIML has a preference for the placement. Only 10 percent of students from our course have received an internship opportunity. If you look at this college for placements, then it's not the best option.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is pretty good, and well-maintained classrooms and library are also well-maintained, and the campus hostel is the best option in SMEC, and food quality is better than that of other campus hostels. There are also sports rooms available, and a badminton and volleyball court is also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This is a good college(SMEC).

content.Placements: Almost 75% students are placed in our course. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the lowest package is 3LPA. The top companies that are recruiting are Google, Microsoft, and Amazon. Almost 90% got internships from our course. The top roles were web developers and full-stack developers.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities were not bad, there were fully spaced labs and classrooms. The library had a lot of collections of books that were helpful. The facilities were good in the hostel, the food is also better, and all day, the mess is clean and neat. The medical facilities and games were also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This is the best college based on students' feedback.

content.Placements: Almost 75% of students were placed in our course. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the lowest package is 5 LPA. Top companies recruiting are Amazon, Deloitte, and Microsoft. Almost 90% of students got internships. The top roles offered in our course are data analyst, software developer, and product manager.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our college are good, with well-specified labs, well-designed classrooms, and a library full of advanced books. The quality of the college hostel is good, where we have the freedom to do anything and enjoy space during exams. The food in the canteen is also good, and all medical facilities are available. We can play sports as well.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with good facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: It is a good college. The infrastructure is good. It has a number of labs and a seminar hall. There are very good facilities. The hostel food is also good. It also has a canteen and medical facilities. We can play sports and games. There is a playground to play any games.

reviews.review_heading: The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused, designed in line with modern technological needs.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our department are well-developed and contribute greatly to the overall learning experience. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, allowing students to access study materials, research papers, and online resources at any time. The labs are one of the major strengths of the department, equipped with updated computers, licensed software, and project facilities that encourage innovation and practical learning. In addition, the classrooms are spacious, smart-enable...

reviews.review_heading: It is worth studying for this money compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: We have good labs with a fast network, and the systems are up to date, and the chairs and computers are in working condition. We can learn what we want in the labs. And also, good bus facilities are provided by the management in every part of the city.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is not good, they don't even speak English accurately.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, they built a new block, which is very good, with good computers and infrastructure. In the old blocks, there are old computers. In old blocks, if anything is missing, they collect money from you. If you want to join this college, don't expect good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: The group director of the college has changed this year, we have to see what he will do.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms of IT, AIML, CSG, and AIDS are below average compared to CSE and CSE (AIML). Labs are also the same. College atmosphere is also not so bad. PCs are the old model, and the Wi-Fi is good. Canteen is neat and clean but the food items are expensive.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college.
reviews.review_text: The college has many positive things. It has fully automatic labs, well-designed classrooms, and Wi-Fi is available if needed. There is a library where we can access books for use. The college hostel is the best thing about the college. It has a spacious atmosphere and good food. The ground is also very spacious, where we can interact in sports.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good, but some improvements are needed.
reviews.review_text: Our department has good infrastructure facilities, like computer labs with proper systems. There is a medical room with first aid and good sports facilities, with separate playgrounds for volleyball, cricket, and a shuttle court. The hostel facilities are good, with clean rooms. Each room has four beds.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college.
reviews.review_text: The college boasts good facilities such as well-designed labs, spacious classrooms, and a peaceful library. The hostel provides good food, spacious accommodation, and is eco-friendly. There is a designated sports hour each week, and the mess and canteen are also good. A doctor is available to take care of students.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best engineering college.
reviews.review_text: Every day in the afternoon of the college, the labs will be provided, and viva, lab tests, and experiments are done in the college. Wi-Fi and ethernet will be provided in labs. In college, canteens and medical facilities are available. Every year, sports day is celebrated in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: Every afternoon, the college provides labs where students can conduct viva voce, tests, and experiments. All necessary equipment is provided in the labs, managed by the college administration. St. Martins Engineering College also has a canteen and medical facilities available for students.

faqs.answer: A:    Mody University of Science and Technology admission is open for MBA. The university offers entrance-based admission to MBA. The university accepts various entrance exams for MBA such as CAT/XAT/NMAT/CMAT/MAT/ATMA/GMAT. Further, university also conduct Mody University Entrance Test, followed by PI round. faqs.answer: Mody University of Science and Technology provides a unique opportunity for female students all over the world to pursue undergraduate and postgraduate programs through MUSAT (Mody University Scholarship cum Admission Test). The admission process involves three simple steps:Step 1: Fill and submit the application form online.Step 2: Download the PDF of the application form from the website, fill it in, and send it along with a Demand Draft of INR 1000 drawn in favour of "Mody University of Science and Technology", payable at Lakshmangarh or Sikar. Mail it to the Central Admissions Office.Step 3: You can obtain the prospectus and application form in person from the Mody University of Science and Technology, Lakshmangarh office, upon payment of INR 1000 in cash.

review_summary.college_name: Mody University of Science and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) + Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with faculty members and placements in 2025 but infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: There are no such good placements offered this year. Only sales companies are coming in which few are fraud as well, having police complain over them, and scamming students. But they guarantee 100% placements. Last year the highest package was 6 LPA - 7 LPA for BBA. For MBA the average salary ranges between 8 LPA - 9 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite great of this college with great library, labs, and classrooms. But hostels are not quite safe nowadays and a lot of illegal things are been done there. The food quality of food is average, no such good medical facilities are available there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The best college with a really fascinating campus.

content.Placements: 80-85% of students get placed in my course. The highest package offered in my course ranges from 6 LPA - 7 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. The average package varies between 4 LPA - 5 LPA. TCS, Infosys, and Wipro are some of the top companies in my course. Internships are generally not guaranteed. But at least 70-80% of students are offered internships by companies like Infosys, TCS, etc. Roles offered are data analyst, data scientist, web developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at Mody University is very fabulous. It has a Wi-Fi connection overall in the building. There are well-facilitated labs and it is very big. There is a huge library and classrooms are also very clean and digitalised. Hostels are very hygienic. The food is also very nice. Mody gives a nice platform for a sports person, it also keeps track offer physical health.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Campus of college is very aesthetic.

content.Placements: Placement rates are very high. Every student gets placed in top companies if someone is not capable they also get some package. The highest package is 6 LPA-7 LPA for BCA students. Top companies are Accenture, Deloitte, Amazon, and Myntra. Top roles offered are web developer, data science, digital marketer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very nice from mess to different labs everything is available as per requirement. Library also has all books for different courses. Hostels are also well managed and get cleaned every day. Rooms are also spacious. University campus includes many grounds for all sports both indoor and outdoor.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Campus is very good and aesthetic.

content.Placements: It doesn't have placement for BCA and MCA they promised full placement and now they are not referring even one company for BCA. There are at least 30-40 companies for B. Tech and not for BCA they even keep students neglected. And doesn't even worth the money also.
content.Infrastructure: Food quality is good but it's not worth the fees they receive. Hostel room quality is very good. Food is also sometimes good and sometimes not good but we get sweets for dinner every day which is the best part. Food according to festivals is also served.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I would recommend Mody University as it has the best campus and best facilities.

content.Placements: Mody University has an 85% placement rate here and the maximum is 5 LPA, with the minimum being 2 LPA for BCA. Many companies like Flipkart, Infosys, Wipro, TCS, Visa, etc., visit for placements. Top roles are software and web developer, data analyst, cyber security analyst, etc. My college has a great percentage of students getting placed. The top companies also prefer it more than your University. It is NAAC A+ rated. It is rated as the best women's University in the Asia Pacific by ASSOCHAM.
content.Infrastructure: Mody University has Wi-Fi available for all, very well-facilitated labs, smart classrooms, and a huge library. The hostel is quite nice, and the food is very healthy as everything is done inside the campus. The hostels are very well cleaned, and it has 200+ faculty members and 7 different schools according to your field.

admission_overview.college_name: Mody University of Science and Technology Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

admission_process.title: Mody University of Science and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Mody University of Science and Technology admission is open.The university offers courses at the UG, PG, and doctoral levels. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exams accepted by the university, such as JEE Main, GATE, NATA, NEET, CAT, XAT, NMAT, CMAT and others.Mody University of Science and Technologyalso conducts university-based entrance exams and interviews for both UG and PG courses. Further, for admission to some UG and PG courses university offers merit-based admission. Candidates looking for admission to any course can apply on the official website of the university. To know more about Mody University of Science and Technology admission, course eligibility, selection criteria and admission process, go through the following sections:

Mody University of Science and Technology admission is primarily entrance-based. Further, for some courses, the university offers admission based on the last qualifying exam score. The university offers different programmes under various schools, such as School of Business, School of Design, School of Engineering, and others, at UG, PG, and doctoral levels. The courses includeBA, MA,MSc, BTech,MBA, PhD, and others. Candidates looking for admission to Mody University of Science and Technology must have a bachelor's degree for admission to PG courses and have passed Class 12 for admission to UG courses. Additionally, applicants are required to appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university for their desired course. Given below are the eligibility and selection criteria for Mody University of Science and Technology courses:

Pass Class 10 and Class 12 or equivalent with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the subjects Chemistry/Computer science/ Bio-Technology/Biology and adequate proficiency in English
Class 10 and Class 12 or its equivalent in any stream with proficiency in English from a recognised board
Class 10 and Class 12 or its equivalent in any stream in proficiency in English with 45% aggregate from a recognised board
Class 10 and Class 12 in Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics with 50% aggregate
10+3 with subjects of Mathematics with 50% aggregate
Graduation degree in any discipline with 50% aggregate
CAT/ XAT/NMAT/ CMAT/MAT/ ATMA/GMAT/ Mody University Entrance Test +PI
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreMody University of Science and Technology courses
Download:Mody University of Science and Technology Broucher

Mody University of Science and Technology admission process 2025 includes various steps that must be completed by all candidates to get admission into the university. The process starts with the submission of an application form, followed by a course-specific entrance exam, and other selection rounds if applicable. After the selection rounds, course-wise merit lists are released on the official website of Mody University. Candidates who get shortlisted are required to submit the necessary fee to confirm their final seat. Find below theMody University of Science and Technology admission process:

Candidates looking for admission to Mody University must apply for admission by going to the official website of the university or visiting the university campus directly for offline application. The application process is conducted in online and offline modes.

Once the application window is closed, applicants are required to apply and appear for a course-specific entrance exam and other selection rounds as well. For some courses the university conducts and accepts, national-level exam scores for admission. Further, for some courses, the university offers admission based on the last qualifying exam score. Once all selection rounds are complete, Mody University of Science and Technology released course-wise merit lists on the official website.
Applicants who get shortlisted in the selection round are required to pay a certain amount ofMody University of Science and Technology feeto lock the final seat.

faqs.question: What is the fees of Mody University of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: The courses offered by the School of Engineering and Technology and the School of Business are duly approved by AICTE. Mody University of Science and Technology offers various courses including UG, PG and PhD levels. Admission is entrance-based- based and eligibility will be merit-based. Find below the fees for various courses offered by Mody University of Science and Technology:CoursesTuition FeesBDesINR 8.3 lakhMDesINR 3 lakhBScINR 3.3 lakh - INR 4.4 lakhBTechINR 6.1 lakh - INR 11.3 lakhBA LLBINR 7.6 lakh - INR 9.8 lakhMScINR 1.3 lakh - INR 1.6 lakhBBAINR 4.5 lakh - INR 9 lakhMBAINR 5.8 lakh - INR 9 lakh

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Mody University of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: Mody University of Science and Technology offers entrance-based admission to some of its UG, PG and PhD courses, such as BTech, BArch, MBA, BA LLB and others. Further, for some courses like BA, BCA, Bcom, MCom, and others university offers merit-based admission. Candidates looking for admission to any of these courses must appear for various entrance exams which includes CAT/XAT/NMAT/CMAT/MAT/ATMA/GMAT/JEE Main/ Mody University Entrance Test and other. Further, for direct admission, candidates are required to pass Class 10 and Class 12 for UG courses and pass graduation degree for PG courses.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for Mody University?
faqs.answer: Mody University of Science and Technology provides a unique opportunity for female students all over the world to pursue undergraduate and postgraduate programs through MUSAT (Mody University Scholarship cum Admission Test). The admission process involves three simple steps:Step 1:Fill and submit the application form online.Step 2:Download the PDF of the application form from the website, fill it in, and send it along with a Demand Draft of INR 1000 drawn in favour of "Mody University of Science and Technology", payable at Lakshmangarh or Sikar. Mail it to the Central Admissions Office.Step 3:You can obtain the prospectus and application form in person from the Mody University of Science and Technology, Lakshmangarh office, upon payment of INR 1000 in cash.

faqs.question: When was CAT 2025 exam conducted?
faqs.answer: The CAT exam is always conducted in November every year so CAT 2026 will be conducted in November next year. Students can clickhereto know more about the CAT examination.

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is Mody University. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the India Today 2025, the institute ranked #133 under Engineering (Private) category, and #163 under Engineering. Mody University excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around Mody University rankings is covered in the following article:

rankings.highlight: 9th Best Among India Today Ranked Colleges In Rajasthan In 2025

qs_world.description:
Based on the rankings from QS World University Rankings, Mody University outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the QS World University Rankings system. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Mody University fell 300 ranks to #1201 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It has been recognized that the institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, Mody University fell 105 ranks to #397 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Discover the latest rankings and categories provided by other ranking bodies listed below.

hostel_campus.college_name: Mody University of Science and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The campus has 28 hostels, all of which are air-conditioned except for 3 hostels. Each hostel houses 180 students and each student can choose between single, double or four-bed facilities with an option of AC or non AC rooms. All hostel floors have been equipped with water coolers with the latest RO technology and students can also enjoy 24×7 Wi-Fi connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with faculty members and placements in 2025 but infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite great of this college with great library, labs, and classrooms. But hostels are not quite safe nowadays and a lot of illegal things are been done there. The food quality of food is average, no such good medical facilities are available there.

reviews.review_heading: The best college with a really fascinating campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Mody University is very fabulous. It has a Wi-Fi connection overall in the building. There are well-facilitated labs and it is very big. There is a huge library and classrooms are also very clean and digitalised. Hostels are very hygienic. The food is also very nice. Mody gives a nice platform for a sports person, it also keeps track offer physical health.

reviews.review_heading: Campus of college is very aesthetic.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very nice from mess to different labs everything is available as per requirement. Library also has all books for different courses. Hostels are also well managed and get cleaned every day. Rooms are also spacious. University campus includes many grounds for all sports both indoor and outdoor.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is very good and aesthetic.
reviews.review_text: Food quality is good but it's not worth the fees they receive. Hostel room quality is very good. Food is also sometimes good and sometimes not good but we get sweets for dinner every day which is the best part. Food according to festivals is also served.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend Mody University as it has the best campus and best facilities.
reviews.review_text: Mody University has Wi-Fi available for all, very well-facilitated labs, smart classrooms, and a huge library. The hostel is quite nice, and the food is very healthy as everything is done inside the campus. The hostels are very well cleaned, and it has 200+ faculty members and 7 different schools according to your field.

reviews.review_heading: Mody University: In Revel and in Real
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is just awesome, with labs, smart classrooms with air conditioning, and Wi-Fi. The hostel is also excellent, offering all facilities including mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports and games. Proper security is available, and transportation within the campus is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Make you career mood happy with mody University.
reviews.review_text: Overall, college infrastructure is good, but MBA buildings have weird infrastructure. You will find peacocks and temples in the campus area. The college annual festival, Unayaan, is celebrated on a large scale in November. Teachers provide study material; notes and books are available in the library. Colleges have Wi-Fi. You can search for any information by sitting in classrooms, but you are restricted to downloading movies from Wi-Fi. Classroom amenities are good; they provide comfortable chai...

reviews.review_heading: The placement rate is good and overall, other things are fine.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is amazing; bad air conditioning labs and a well-equipped library are the best. To be honest, if you live on campus, you are not allowed to leave or order food, and the mess food is terrible. Students are dissatisfied with the food quality.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mody University.
reviews.review_text: All the basic facilities were provided at the university, such as Wi-Fi, library, labs, etc. The hostel too had all the basic necessities such as tables, mattresses, etc. The quality of food was pretty good, but the taste could be better. There is a clinic on campus, but it is not free. There are courts and grounds for almost all the commonly played sports. There is a horse-riding ground too, and a lot of students get involved in one or more sports.

reviews.review_heading: Reviewing Mody University of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: All our Laboratories are filled with highly equipped instruments which are needed for practicals. A large number of faculty members and technicians work here. Around 60+ buses are running regularly from our college campus. All the medical facilities are available within our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Get the best experience with Mody University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is excellent, having thousands of trees and herbs, birds, peacock and other beauties. Wi-Fi is available 24*7 and the classroom is comfortable with smart boards, air airconditioning and very comfortable sitting amenities.

reviews.review_heading: Top-notch Infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The university boasts top-notch infrastructure. The expansive and scenic surroundings feature trees, mountains, and various flowers, creating a pleasant environment. The library is spacious and well-stocked with books. Classrooms are large, and the labs are well-equipped with modern facilities.

reviews.review_heading: A best college which provides good placement opportunity!
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilis one of the best facility in Mody University. You will find one of the best hostel facility in private colleges in Rajasthan. Here you will get rooms on double and triple sharing basis. Rooms are available in both AC and NON AC format. Food served in the mess is proper food with no onion and garlic in it.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money, time, and a life time experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure plays an important role before choosing any college because it does help us shape us. This college have great infra with good facilities and greenery around. There are around more than 20 hostel building with emmense facilities there and a horse Riding ground, football, hockey, bollyball and many more sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mody University of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. There are well-established and well-maintained classrooms. Our labs are equipped with high-end IBM and Accenture systems. Our college infrastructure is excellent. The mess food is good.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Mody University of Science and Technology

likes.text: Companies like Accenture, Infosysy, IBM, John Deere, Mahindra and Mahindra, Oracle, Honeywell are top recruiters.
Students did their internship in companies like Outlook Magazine, HDFC Bank, Regal Shipping, etc.

paragraphs: Mody University of Science and Technology (MUST) is a popular private university in Lakshmangarh, Rajasthan. It has various programs for women students. The university has Grade-A+ certification by the NAAC and is recognised by UGC, BCI, and AICTE. MUST is a member of the AIU and the Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business, and provides popular programs like BTech and BSc.

MUST Lakshamangarh is committed to providing quality higher education to deserving girl students, despite financial barriers. The university has several scholarship schemes for students, depending on both the merit and entrance-test basis. Also, students can benefit from diverse special scholarship programs. review_summary.college_name: Paavai Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, a good college with strong infrastructure and average placements.

content.Placements: Placements at Paavai Engineering College are average. Around 50–60% of students from my course get placed every year. The average package ranges between 2.5 and 3 LPA, while the highest package goes up to around 5–6 LPA for a few students. The lowest package is around 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, CTS, Accenture, Capgemini, and HCL. Internship opportunities are provided to some students, mainly through training partners and external companies. Roles offered are mostly software engineer, system engineer, support engineer, and trainee roles. Students who focus on skill development have better chances of placement.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Always the best college and had the best placements.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary was 10 LPA, and the lowest salary was 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies were Amazon, Wipro and Flipkart. Around 68% of students got internships. The top roles were marketing manager and product manager.
content.Infrastructure: The campus provided good hostel facilities for both boys and girls. A bedroom with an attached bathroom and a washing machine was available. The food was good. The infrastructure was good. The classrooms were neat and clean with comfortable benches. The labs were well-equipped and had a good library. A 24-hour Wi-Fi facility was available. The sports facilities were good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college has excellent infrastructure.

content.Placements: I was placed in Edu-Versity in the package of 8 LPA. Now I have become a TL in that company. I'm glad to express my thanks to my college committee. A special thanks to the placement advisory. I got 90 percent in my academics. Mostly, 80 percent of students got an offer from the college placements.
content.Infrastructure: The food was too good, and the infrastructure was nice. Classrooms are too good and flexible. Labs are too impressed with the equipment. Foods in the mess and canteen are purely fresh. Medical facilities are also available. They are providing sports for the students who are interested.

content.Infrastructure: My college is located between Namakkal and Salem on the national highway. The infrastructure is very good. The campus is very large. The hostel food is acceptable, and the college gives more importance to sports and motivates students.

individual_reviews.title: Really good college, and the facilities are also good.

content.Placements: Most companies are visiting our college for placements. Before placements, the college provides placement training and conducts practice drives. Students can create their own projects and explain them; the projects are typically created in groups of four or five members.
content.Infrastructure: I am studying B.Tech in the IT department. The labs have better facilities. Also, classrooms are equipped with projectors to explain complicated lessons through a visual teaching method. In the library, coding books are available. Canteen food is excellent.

hostel_campus.college_name: Paavai Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good college with strong infrastructure and average placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and well-maintained at Paavai Engineering College. Classrooms are spacious and clean. Laboratories are adequately equipped with the required systems and tools. Wi-Fi connectivity is available, though the speed can vary in some areas. Library has a good collection of academic books, journals, and digital resources. Hostel facilities are decent. Along with regular water and electricity supply. Mess food quality is average and manageable. Medical facilities are available on c...

reviews.review_heading: Always the best college and had the best placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus provided good hostel facilities for both boys and girls. A bedroom with an attached bathroom and a washing machine was available. The food was good. The infrastructure was good. The classrooms were neat and clean with comfortable benches. The labs were well-equipped and had a good library. A 24-hour Wi-Fi facility was available. The sports facilities were good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The food was too good, and the infrastructure was nice. Classrooms are too good and flexible. Labs are too impressed with the equipment. Foods in the mess and canteen are purely fresh. Medical facilities are also available. They are providing sports for the students who are interested.

reviews.review_heading: My college and my journey.
reviews.review_text: My college is located between Namakkal and Salem on the national highway. The infrastructure is very good. The campus is very large. The hostel food is acceptable, and the college gives more importance to sports and motivates students.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college, and the facilities are also good.
reviews.review_text: I am studying B.Tech in the IT department. The labs have better facilities. Also, classrooms are equipped with projectors to explain complicated lessons through a visual teaching method. In the library, coding books are available. Canteen food is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good. I like it.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure and facilities were good. It was spread over 35 acres of land. The classrooms were neat. Labs were well-equipped, and books were available in the library. Facilities were available. The college provided hostel facilities for both boys and girls. The canteen was also available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college and excellent placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was very good. The classrooms look very beautiful with AC. The labs were pretty with the required number of computers. There were many books in the library. Wi-Fi was available. The classrooms were also facilitated with projectors. Our college had a canteen with some snacks. There were sports like basketball and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Paavai College and its placements.
reviews.review_text: My college campus has a good infrastructure and a clear view. In my department, labs are well-maintained by faculty members. There are 3 cafeterias available on my college campus with food and snack items. I am a day scholar and I am not sure about hostel. But rooms are very spacious and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Life at Paavai Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: From the 7th semester onward, students become eligible for placements. Many companies visit the campus, and I received an offer from a service-based company. The highest package is 3.5 LPA. 80% of students get placed. There are more chances to get placed easily in the company.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with wide opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are well-ventilated and neat. They provide enough fans. There are not many complaints about power shortages. Our labs have many necessary equipment. The lab in charges ensure safety precautions with care. There are multiple labs for the same subject.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with good faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like many grounds and auditoriums are available inside the campus. Events, symposiums, and annual days are celebrated. In our college, there is a separate lab for each department. Classrooms are very neat and clean. In the hostel, the food quality is good nowadays. There are 3 canteens and all types of foods are available. A doctor visits the hostel daily to check on any students who are sick or affected and provide tablets. Paavai provides a lot of support to sports and they have a s...

reviews.review_heading: Good college and best placements.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good hostel facilities for both boys and girls. The B.Ed rooms are neat with attached bathrooms. The food is very tasty and hygienic. The infrastructure is awesome. The classrooms are big and neat. The labs are well-equipped with air conditioning. The Wi-Fi is available. The library also has many books available. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements and infrastructure, but scope for improved research and student engage.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi, but the internet speed is very fast. Classrooms and labs are very nice. The hostel and mess are okay. Campus-wide Wi-Fi connectivity is available, though its speed and coverage may vary. Classrooms are spacious and well-ventilated, with audio-visual aids for enhanced learning experiences.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and the environment are good.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. Classrooms are beautiful and air-conditioned. Lab is good. There are high-quality computer labs available. Classrooms are also facilitated with projectors. We have a library for books. We have a tennis court at our college. Our college has a canteen which serves snacks.

reviews.review_heading: Overall Best College for MBA Course.
reviews.review_text: The laboratory is very good, and our classrooms are well-maintained. There are four canteens in this college, offering both vegetarian and non-vegetarian dishes. There is a biomedical instrumentation laboratory and diagnostic and therapeutic equipment. The infrastructure is good, and all the facilities are available. This college received the Best Engineering College award in 2022.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: BV Raju Institute of Technology is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the BVRIT Narsapur programmes is around INR 1,40,000 to 5,40,000.

faqs.answer: A:    BV Raju Institute of Technology has courses such as B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies. BV Raju Institute of Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Pharmaceutical engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Biomedical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in VLSI Design, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Chemical Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses does BV Raju Institute of Technology offer to students?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by BV Raju Institute of Technology is up to 1518. Good thing to know is that BV Raju Institute of Technology has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

The majority of students are from villages.

faqs.answer: BV Raju Institute of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in Engineering/ Technology from a recognised board.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passed B.E / B.Tech in VLSI System Design (or) equivalent from a recognised University.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with the mentioned marks (45 % marks in BC Category ) in aggregate from a recognised Institute/ University. The qualifying degree obtained by the Distance Mode Program/ Open Distance Learning (ODL) should have recognition by the Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB as per UGC Regulations of 2013. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis. The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH, 2004). No maximum age limit.

individual_reviews.title: My BVRIT college life story.

content.Placements: Placements in our course are fairly decent and good. Around 50-60 percent of students manage to get placed through campus recruitment. A few students received a very high package of around 43 LPA. The average package offered is around 7 LPA. The lowest package offered is 3 LPA. Companies such as Accenture, Tech Mahindra, Paltech, LTIMindtree, Persistent Systems, etc., hire students.

The library is accessible during college hours and is useful for studying and reference work. Hostel facilities are one of the positive aspects, as rooms are well furnished with dedicated beds and enough storage space.

cut_off.college_name: BVRIT Narsapur Cutoff 2025: Check TS ICET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: BVRIT Narsapur cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

BVRIT Narsapur TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 7680 and 56664 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the closing rank for the same stood at 6208. For ot

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 7680, 7900 and 8385, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to BVRIT Narsapur. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The BVRIT Narsapur MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 5393. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 6020, and the 2023 cutoff was 3712 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.
Check the table below to know the year, round, category and quota-wise cutoff.

reviews.review_heading: BVRIT is one of the top engineering colleges in Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure, and it provides all facilities for the students of each branch. Wi-Fi facilities are available for both students and faculty. Sports, games, mess, canteen, medical facilities, library, and classrooms are all available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities on campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is excellent, and as long here facilities here are excellent. Wi-Fi facilities are provided by the campus for both students and faculty as well. Here, food quality is good and very tasty in campus hostels, the fee for hostels is Rs. 90,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: I’m absolutely satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of the college is very good and best. All courses are available on campus. The infrastructure of the college is good. Mess, canteen, labs, classrooms, library, Wi-Fi facilities, and digital boards are all provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Typical EAMCET college with no innovative and competent crowd.
reviews.review_text: There are labs, but the point of access to them is restricted after the end of the course. If you have Physics, then you get access to it. Suppose you wanna be an actual engineer and design and build something, you'd have to go through a lot of administration. Washrooms smell, and reveal excrement, and lack handwash or soap. The chair doesn't have backrests, which can get quite uncomfortable for long 3hr sessions.

reviews.review_heading: My BVRIT college life story.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good and suitable for regular academic life. Classrooms are clean, spacious, and well-maintained. The library is accessible during college hours and is useful for studying and reference work. Hostel facilities are one of the positive aspects, as rooms are well furnished with dedicated beds and enough storage space.

reviews.review_heading: Sharing my view on BVRIT College.
reviews.review_text: Campus facilities are good enough for regular college life, but nothing feels comfortable. Hostel stay is one of the good parts here. Rooms are well furnished with separate beds. Washrooms are common, but cleanliness is maintained properly. Classrooms are maintained properly, and the learning environment is calm. Library access during college hours is very helpful, especially during exams and free hours.

reviews.review_heading: College has good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Coming to college infrastructure, we have all the facilities, including Wi-Fi, and the food quality is excellent on the campus. The infrastructure of our branch is simply good. The campus hostels are provided with good food and neat rooms. The library is available for students on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Placements and infrastructure are good on campus.
reviews.review_text: Campus hostels are provided by the college with the best food, and a variety of items are provided on campus.

reviews.review_heading: I’m absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Campus hostels are provided by the college. Wi-Fi facilities are provided by the college management to both students and faculty. A mess and canteen are available on campus with a variety of items, and sports are available in the college with all the equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure is provided by the campus.
reviews.review_text: Coming to our infrastructure, the college has good and the best. The facilities for our course are very good, the infrastructure of the campus is good, and the campus hostels provided by the college are very neat and clean. Wi-Fi facilities are good, library is provided to the students.

reviews.review_heading: My college experience at BVRIT.
reviews.review_text: It has great facilities like Wi-Fi in college and great classrooms. Mess and canteen are hygienic. There is a hospital in college dedicated to safety. There are many sports and games to play. The computer science and engineering (CSE) department at BVRIT Narsapur is supported by good facilities and infrastructure that help students in both academics and skill development. The campus has Wi-Fi connectivity, which is available in academic blocks, hostels, and common areas. It enables students to a...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements are provided for students.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is excellent and super because they provided each and every facility to the students of each branch. Here quality of food is provided in the campus hostels with varieties of items and games, sports are provided in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Coming to our infrastructure, college has good and best infrastructure. Well-maintained library is available in the campus and quality of facilities are available. Labs with classrooms, Wi-Fi facilities, canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games all are available.

reviews.review_heading: Really a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of BVRIT are simply good. Food quality is best, and hygienic food is provided. A well-maintained library is available on the campus for students. Every semester, festivals are organized, like Sankranthi Fest, night events, farewell, freshers, etc.

reviews.review_heading: College has good infrastructure and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities on the campus are very good. Wi-Fi facilities are good, and classrooms with digital boards, projectors, and computers in labs are all available on the campus. Games are provided by the college, and campus hostels are good for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with good management.

review_content.Placements: Almost 30–50% of students get placed in my course each year. The highest package is around 15 LPA, the average is around 4–5 LPA, and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Cognizant, and a few others. Fewer students get internships this year. The top roles offered in my course last year are Data Analyst, Software Engineer, and others.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are quite good. Free Wi-Fi is available in labs, and the overall infrastructure is good. The library is quite good. The quality of food in the canteen is nice. Labs are big with no issues. My library experience is not very good because of a fine. Sports and games happen from time to time, and the AIML department is also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A good engineering college in Jabalpur.

review_content.Placements: Almost 45-55 percent of students last year got placed in my course, and the highest package is around 16 LPA, the average is around 6-8 LPA, and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. I think the top recruiting companies are TCS, Accenture, and Cognizant, and fewer students got internships this year, because the skills that companies want are missing in the students. Top roles offered include Data Analyst, Computer Engineers, and many more in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are quite good, and the infrastructure is also good. The quality of food in the canteen is also nice, and the labs are big, no problem. The library experience is very good in my case because I can sit there for study by bunking the class, and the sports and games also happen, and the AIML department is also nice. But the CSE department is too awesome.

content.Infrastructure: Facilities are quite good, and the infrastructure is also good. The quality of food in the canteen is also nice, and the labs are big, no problem. The library experience is very good in my case because I can sit there for study by bunking the class, and the sports and games also happen, and the AIML department is also nice. But the CSE department is too awesome.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities are good, the study in this college is the best. In the case of placement, it's average.
reviews.review_text: The library is present, and the labs are there. No hostel facility, 2 canteens are available. Sports kota is present, but Wi-Fi and solar facilities are not available in my college. Some classrooms have no AC. Very difficult to suffer in the summer season.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the college infrastructure. Placements are good then but now college.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good, classrooms are also okay. Library condition is well sports and games opportunity is also provided but hostel conditions are not that good. The canteen food is of good quality is also good medical staff present there for the full day. The department is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good management.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are quite good. Free Wi-Fi is available in labs, and the overall infrastructure is good. The library is quite good. The quality of food in the canteen is nice. Labs are big with no issues. My library experience is not very good because of a fine. Sports and games happen from time to time, and the AIML department is also good.

reviews.review_heading: A good engineering college in Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are quite good, and the infrastructure is also good. The quality of food in the canteen is also nice, and the labs are big, no problem. The library experience is very good in my case because I can sit there for study by bunking the class, and the sports and games also happen, and the AIML department is also nice. But the CSE department is too awesome.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with a good environment and good internships.

reviews.review_heading: Really recommended college in Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: Lab conditions are good. The library is good, and the services and books offered are fine. Classrooms are fine, the lighting conditions are also good, and the green board is visible very clearly even from the last bench. The canteen is good and the food is edible.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college and good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good and much helpful. The infrastructure is also good. Department is very nice. The labs are good in space. The library is also much better and sufficient. The quality of food is good. Sports and games are also happen. Mess and medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, not many industry centre studies, so it could be better.
reviews.review_text: Our department provides good facilities, including reliable Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, spacious classrooms, and a resourceful library. Hostel, medical, and sports facilities were not available. the canteen offered good quality food for students.

reviews.review_heading: College is good so you can go and take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: There is a wide range of campuses at this college. There are many facilities like good classrooms, washrooms, etc. In the lab, there is an AC, and the maximum Wi-Fi speed is 50 Mbps. The quality of the food is good but not healthy and the price is higher. There is a separate sports ground and games room.

reviews.review_heading: This college can lead to a good future if you try.
reviews.review_text: There are many such facilities at this college which we get such as Wi-Fi facility, lab facility, library facility, sports facility, and games facility. Hostel facility is not available but medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: By studying in this college, we can brighten our future.
reviews.review_text: All types of game facilities are available. It has a Wi-Fi facility, labs, and sports facilities. The education system of this department is also very good. There are no technical issues.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for making a good future.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like a library, Wi-Fi, labs, sports, canteen, and medical facilities are available in this department. A hostel facility is not provided in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in Jabalpur with a huge campus and great faculty.
reviews.review_text: My college has various facilities and infrastructure. The campus is lush green and is spread over acres. Classrooms are very good, but they don't have Wi-Fi access. The college's library is huge, offering a lot of books with seating space for students. The college also has a spacious canteen, which offers good food.

reviews.review_heading: A very good college with good placements.
reviews.review_text: My college has various facilities, and infrastructure. Buildings are well-maintained and huge. Campus is very huge and filled with greenery, fostering vibrant campus life. Classes are very good, and various labs are available for students. College has its own huge library with spacious seating for students, and a huge canteen which provides good food.

reviews.review_heading: My college is the best when compared to other colleges..
reviews.review_text: The college has a full Wi-Fi campus where Wi-Fi is free for all students. Labs are of good quality, and everything is present in labs. Computer labs are also well-maintained. Classrooms are also good enough. It has a duct cooling system, not air conditioned, but it's okay. The library is also available in college for free to all students. The hostel is acceptable. The quality of food is also good in the mess. The college canteen is the best part of this college, and sports are also good enough. ...

review_summary.college_name: Saraswati College of Engineering Kharghar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Bad placement, bad management, bad infrastructure, bad facilities, and they only seek money.

content.Placements: As per now, in 8th semester, no one is placed. The people who are getting placed through off-campus are also facing attendance issues. They are not giving attendance to them and taking money from people with less attendance for giving exam. Placement is very bad, companies that are non-tech who's requirement is that students should know how to drive so that they can deliver in Pune. No one is taking any action over low to no placement, and they are only here for taking money from students.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi available for students. Labs are good but there are still problems with the printers as there are not much resources in lab. Some computers still work like 90s. Internet is not available many times. Classrooms are like school classrooms even teachers struggle to teach in there. Taking gym fee but the gym is not maintained at all. Taking bus money but services are very poor. We have to take rickshaw to the college many times especially on exam days. Canteen is okay. Sports are done through taking donations from other students, so poor management.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is fine, and faculty is also good

content.Placements: A maximum of 100 to 200 people are placed in companies. The highest package is 12 LPA and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. Recruiters are Wipro, Capgemini, and Tata. The campus cell provides training for interviews and tests, which is beneficial for students who are giving interviews.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, labs, and the library are superb. Class teaching and lab teaching are best. The library provides all types of good books, which give a lot of information, and semester-wise subject books are also available. This helps us learn properly from the books in the library. Teachers also giving PPT notes for each module.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely regret my decision to take admission in this college.

content.Placements: Around 35% of people get placed, and the highest package was 4 lakhs last year. I don't have an idea about the recruiting companies, to be honest. Only 30 students out of 120 are getting internships from the college, and the rest have to find them on their own. I have no idea about the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is so bad that I personally don't like to go to the college. There's no Wi-Fi, no proper labs, and the library is inadequate. Food is not good. The canteen is not well-managed. I'm sorry to say, but there are no medical facilities available in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: All About Saraswati College of Engineering.

content.Placements: The placement in this is very low, only the top students from each class get into companies, companies like TCS and Infosys and some small local construction companies also visit the campus for placement. I have seen some students giving mock interviews in the college.
content.Infrastructure: There are no hostels available in the college, you have to opt for a PG or flat near the college and far it's your choice, but the college doesn't offer any hostel facilities. And the food in the canteen is okay, they put Schezwan chutney in almost all the dishes only leaving dal chawal, biryani and some dishes, and the canteen is pure veg.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are very supportive and encouraging.

content.Placements: Approximately 10 students got placed in the course. The highest package is up to 7 LPA, the lowest package is up to 3 LPA, and the average is between 4-6 LPA offered in college. Reliance, Capgemini, and TCS are the recruitment companies that came for campus placement. Business representative and software developer are the roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities provided in our college, having big classrooms and big benches, but there is no quality fan. Light issues are always present, and there is no Wi-Fi connection to the college campus. The canteen serves good food that is tasty and maintains hygiene. There is no Wi-Fi on the college campus; only practical labs have that. Electrical facilities should be improved.

paragraphs: Saraswati College of Engineering Kharghar offers UG, PG courses.Saraswati College of Engineering course admissionsare based on the entrance exam + last educational qualification. The college offers a range of undergraduate, and postgraduate courses in Engineering and IT And Software. Popular courses offered by the college are BTech and MTech. Read on to know more about course admissions.
The college offers courses in a full-time mode in two courses. Saraswati College of Engineering offers BTech and MTech courses in full-time mode.

Saraswati College of Engineering Kharghar offers BTech courses for four at the UG level. The BTech and MTech courses are offered byUniversity of Mumbai (MU).Candidates can read the table below to learn more on the college admission:
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from the official website.

Saraswati College of Engineering Kharghar offers courses in the fields of Engineering, IT and Software. Students seeking admission must meet the course-specific eligibility and selection conditions. The table carries course-wise eligibility and selection criteria forSCOE course admissions:

SCOE fees for all UG & PG courses include components, such as tuition fees, hostel fees and one-time fee payments. Further, seats may vary as per the course type and number of specialisations available. Candidates can check the following table for detailed fees and seat intake for all the popular courses:
Note:The above-mentioned fee & seat intake details are sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and are subject to change.
Saraswati College of Engineering Kharghar admission process is a multi-step process. Students can check the points mentioned below:
A.DTE CAP Round Admission Schedule:The DTE CAP round admission schedule will be published by DTE in newspapers and on DTE official website.
B. Institute Level Quota Admission Schedule:Will be available on the institutional website

C.Assignment of Merit Number-All the eligible Candidates who have submitted the Application Form on or before the last date specified for the submission of Application Form for Admission through CAP shall be assigned a merit number

D. Centralised Admission Process (CAP) –Filling Online Application Form by Candidate for participation in the Centralised Admission Process. All the aspiring candidates shall fill in the Online Application Form for admission through their login which is provided to them at the time of applying to the Common Entrance Test (CET) conducted for that course.

faqs.question: How are seats allocated for courses at Saraswati College of Engineering?

The seat allocated are mnetioned in the points below:DTE CAP Round Admission: 80% seats admission are allotted by DTE as per the guidelines published on DTE official website65% admission by Central Allotment Process (CAP) of Government of Maharashtra through MH-CET 2020.15% admission by Central Allotment Process (CAP) of Government of Maharashtra through JEE/ MH-CET 2020 for MS/OMS candidate.20% admission for institute level quota.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.review_heading: Precise Review on SCOE: Placement, Courses, Hostel Facilities, College Life, Fests, and Campus Life.
reviews.review_text: The courses available at SCOE are good enough to cover all the aspects and the real-world applications as well as the practical applications. reviews.review_heading: Good college have good placement records from the last few years and good faculty.

Sports are not often played, but the college has yearly contests and overall is good.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: The college conducts mostly digital classes, and each floor is equipped with well-equipped labs. The cafeteria is spacious, offering excellent food. The college strongly supports sports with facilities including badminton and basketball courts, as well as a large gaming area.

reviews.review_heading: Happy with the college, glad that I enrolled here.
reviews.review_text: College maintains high cleanliness. Nice hilltop view and a good canteen, pace very friendly environment surrounded in nature and birds. The course enrolled has good teaching staff with a level education, and their learning and teaching skills are very much good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. Classrooms are average. The canteen should be well-maintained. The canteen workers should be more active. The library is good. Our college has a sports room. They should provide more sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is peaceful with beautiful mountains.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are great. The infrastructure is better. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratory is well-designed. Classrooms are well maintained. The library is air-conditioned. Hostel facilities are not available in our college. There is a huge canteen. It provides a purely vegetarian menu for the students. The food quality is very good. Sports are average. There is no playground on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good teachers and smart classrooms.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good labs, wide classrooms, and a library with abundant books. Wi-Fi is provided for students and faculty members. Hostel facilities are provided to students if required. It has facilities of a gym and indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, proper laboratories, modern and smart classrooms, PG computer laboratories, student sections, exam sections, hygienic food, good medical facilities, ground for sports and rooms for indoor games, and good Wi-Fi connectivity in all the classrooms are available in our college.

courses. JLU Bhopal courses are offered across many streams such as Management, Science, Pharmacy, Law, Journalism & Communication, Commerce, and others.

The MBA programme offered by the JLU University is a two-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Finance, Marketing, HR, Business Analytics, and others.

reviews_list.review_title: One of the best university.

review_content.Placements: We had to complete all semesters to be eligible for placement. Companies that offered placements included KPMG, Deloitte, Wipro, TCS, and Reliance etc. The average package was quite low, around 3 LPA, while the highest was approximately 6.5 LPA with some perks. I was not sure about the company names or student details. Since I was pursuing CA, I did not look for placements after my degree.
review_content.Infrastructure: There were 21 hostels, and any one of them could be allotted to a candidate. Hostels were generally equipped with basic facilities and mostly comprised twin-sharing rooms. Each hostel had its own food canteen, where breakfast, lunch, snacks, and dinner were provided daily. There were ample options for both vegetarian and non-vegetarian candidates.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (Oct 2025) - B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Not actually a great infrastructure, but a vibrant campus life with an industry-relevant curriculum.

review_content.Placements: Hi, I am from the 2024-2028 batch of B.Tech in CSE (AI) at Jagran Lakecity University, Bhopal. Around 70% of the students in my course got placed. The highest package is 10 LPA, the lowest is 2.2 LPA, and the average is 5.5 LPA. Top recruiters include Infosys, TCS, Accenture, and Deloitte. Around 70% of the students secured internships at IBM, HCL, and Microsoft. Top roles offered are software developer, AI/ML engineer, and data analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university provides a pretty okay infrastructure. The CSE/AI department has labs, low-speed Wi-Fi, and non-AC classrooms with projectors. The library is in good condition, and it is well stocked with fresh books. Hostel facilities are comfortable. The mess is hygienic and offers a variety of foods, while the canteen serves fast food and snacks. The university provides 24/7 medical services. For sports lovers, JLU has football, basketball, volleyball, badminton, and cricket, along with a gym facility. The university also organizes cultural events, fests, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the finest universities.

review_content.Placements: After the 3rd semester, the campus placements started and before that, we had done internships in good companies. During placements, many reputed companies like TCS, Federal Bank, Axis Bank, etc., visit the college. All students get campus placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has 3 types of hostels/dorms (called IIMA) are there in IIMA. Old dorms, new dorms, and married student hostel. Two messes are serving food to the whole IIMA community. In terms of quality, I would rate it as average, considering the type of food served. It is mandatory to stay in hostels for PGP students.

review_summary.college_name: JLU Bhopal Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college has amazing placements and faculty.

content.Placements: We have amazing placements offered for digital marketing and media positions with MNCs. Almost every student got admitted to good companies, and we are grateful to our faculty and career cell for helping us achieve our own better future. We got amazing packages offered.
content.Infrastructure: Amazing and safe campus with a comfortable environment. It is modern and spacious with attractive built-ins and a library as well. Classes are clean and well settled, with digital learning to be done. The canteen provides good and healthy options for food, prepared neatly.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business and Law - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the university.

content.Placements: I am a student of BBA in aviation and airport management, and I am currently transitioning to my second year (third semester). We are promised 100% placement at the end of our course. They have a 100% placement record from previous batches. My batch is the first for this course in this college and they have assured 100% placement.
content.Infrastructure: All required facilities are provided from lifts to smart classes to cafes and stationery within the college, and free Wi-Fi throughout the campus. The college provides different labs related to respective courses, a large library, and hostel students are satisfied with their facilities. There is a free mess available for hostel students and paid-for day scholars. Jagran is known for sports, events, and games. Basic medical facilities are provided.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Oct 2025) - MBA in Hospitality and Tourism Management - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: One of the best university.

content.Placements: We had to complete all semesters to be eligible for placement. Companies that offered placements included KPMG, Deloitte, Wipro, TCS, and Reliance etc. The average package was quite low, around 3 LPA, while the highest was approximately 6.5 LPA with some perks. I was not sure about the company names or student details. Since I was pursuing CA, I did not look for placements after my degree.
content.Infrastructure: There were 21 hostels, and any one of them could be allotted to a candidate. Hostels were generally equipped with basic facilities and mostly comprised twin-sharing rooms. Each hostel had its own food canteen, where breakfast, lunch, snacks, and dinner were provided daily. There were ample options for both vegetarian and non-vegetarian candidates.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Oct 2025) - B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Not actually a great infrastructure, but a vibrant campus life with an industry-relevant curriculum.

content.Placements: Hi, I am from the 2024-2028 batch of B.Tech in CSE (AI) at Jagran Lakecity University, Bhopal. Around 70% of the students in my course got placed. The highest package is 10 LPA, the lowest is 2.2 LPA, and the average is 5.5 LPA. Top recruiters include Infosys, TCS, Accenture, and Deloitte. Around 70% of the students secured internships at IBM, HCL, and Microsoft. Top roles offered are software developer, AI/ML engineer, and data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The university provides a pretty okay infrastructure. The CSE/AI department has labs, low-speed Wi-Fi, and non-AC classrooms with projectors. The library is in good condition, and it is well stocked with fresh books. Hostel facilities are comfortable. The mess is hygienic and offers a variety of foods, while the canteen serves fast food and snacks. The university provides 24/7 medical services. For sports lovers, JLU has football, basketball, volleyball, badminton, and cricket, along with a gym facility. The university also organizes cultural events, fests, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the finest universities.

content.Placements: After the 3rd semester, the campus placements started and before that, we had done internships in good companies. During placements, many reputed companies like TCS, Federal Bank, Axis Bank, etc., visit the college. All students get campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: It has 3 types of hostels/dorms (called IIMA) are there in IIMA. Old dorms, new dorms, and married student hostel. Two messes are serving food to the whole IIMA community. In terms of quality, I would rate it as average, considering the type of food served. It is mandatory to stay in hostels for PGP students.

placement_report.college_name: JLU Bhopal Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: JLU Bhopal Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The University has disclosed 2023 placement data on its official website. The highest package offered during Jagran Lakecity University placements 2023 stood at INR 14.25 LPA . Earlier, the highest package offered during Jagran Lakecity University placements 2021 was INR 15 LPA . According to the NIRF report 2025, 7 LLB, 39 BBA LLB, 6 LLM and 29 MBA students were placed during JLU Bhopal placements 2024. Further, the median package offered to MBA students during JLU Bhopal placements 2024 was INR 6.60 LPA. For Law courses, the median package ranged between INR 2.40 LPA and INR 3 LPA . The top recruiters of JLU Bhopal during the past years included HCL, Airtel, TCS, Infosys, Amazon, Deloitte, Wipro , etc.
