Students can also appear for government competitive exams such as the Judicial Services Examination, Assistant Public Prosecutor, and more to get a government job. outlook.description:
JLU Bhopal has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Engineering (Private)' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for JLU Bhopal indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. It has been seen that in the 'Engineering (Private)' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, JLU Bhopal's rank is #83, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering (Private)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'BBA', the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, JLU Bhopal's rank is #92, the same as last year's rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
The institute has displayed an increasing trend in the 'Hotel Management (Private)' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, JLU Bhopal climbed 3 ranks to #26 rank in the 'Hotel Management (Private)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
In the 'Mass Communication (Private)' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, JLU Bhopal's rank is #13, the same as last year's rank in the 'Mass Communication (Private)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: JLU Bhopal Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The university offers comprehensive hostel facilities for boys and girls separately within the campus and outside respectively. JLU has a capacity to accommodate 400+ students which will be increased to 1000 by 2022. The Student Enrichment Hub at Chandanpura has a modern hostel, which has 3 blocks and 14 floors where students can avail single, double or triple occupancy, a/c and non a/c rooms as per their preference. The rooms are fully furnished, properly ventilated and adequately sunlit during the day. The off-campus accommodation of JLU offers double and triple occupancy rooms and can house 70+ students; bus service is available for traveling to and fro campuses.

library.description:
The library is unarguably the most important academic facility of any university. Jagran Lakecity Universityy has gone far and beyond to make sure that its Library is one of a kind, not only in the country but in the whole world. The primary library at JLU Student Enrichment Hub, is a breathtaking iconic 90 feet tall PYRAMID, which is the only functional pyramid used for academic purpose in India. Spread in 28000 sq. ft. the structure houses 35000 books and has a subscription of 30+ monthly and annual journals and magazines. The Pyramid has a quiet reading area for 100 students and also gives access to vast reading resources online. The students and staff at JLU are provided access credentials to ‘McGraw Hill E-Books’ which additionally opens millions of books, journals, research papers, and much more. The Faculty of Law house a separate ‘Mini-Library’ in Block C, which has around 2000 hardcover books, and students of law, are provided access to thousands of legal resources online.

The Library at the main MungaliaChap Campus of JLU houses over 8000 books, magazines, and journals. It also has 25 computer systems that serve the purpose of an E-Library for the learners. The library is at Block A and has a subscription of 8 annual and monthly journals especially from the Engineering and Hospitality sector.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball

cafeteria.description:
Mess: 
The University’s dining hall through its modern kitchen and a seating capacity for 180 people is designed to cater students & staff with hygienically cooked, mouthwatering dishes. The hostilities indulge in nutritious food 4 times a day and the mess will not let you miss your home cooked meal. The best part about the mess at Jagran Lakecity University is that the student committee along with faculty members decides the menu for every semester. So, when students and administrators join hands to improve the food on campus, mess is no longer a monotonous place with boring food.

Food Court:
For the foodies, our campus has a lively eating space, called ‘APPETITE’. It has 5 food outlets where you can indulge yourself in the delightful cuisines from around the globe. Food is an opportunity for a university to define its culture and APPETITE is really that - a melting point for the entire university to come, sit together as one single community and enjoy the food.
But that’s not all, JLU regularly hosts food festivals and events that appeal to every palette and are amazing to socialize and make new friends. Food is nourishment for our bodies and a lot more than that, so we have facilitated the students to take the time to enjoy it.

reviews.review_heading: The college has amazing placements and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Amazing and safe campus with a comfortable environment. It is modern and spacious with attractive built-ins and a library as well. Classes are clean and well settled, with digital learning to be done. The canteen provides good and healthy options for food, prepared neatly.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the university.
reviews.review_text: All required facilities are provided from lifts to smart classes to cafes and stationery within the college, and free Wi-Fi throughout the campus. The college provides different labs related to respective courses, a large library, and hostel students are satisfied with their facilities. There is a free mess available for hostel students and paid-for day scholars. Jagran is known for sports, events, and games. Basic medical facilities are provided.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best university.
reviews.review_text: There were 21 hostels, and any one of them could be allotted to a candidate. Hostels were generally equipped with basic facilities and mostly comprised twin-sharing rooms. Each hostel had its own food canteen, where breakfast, lunch, snacks, and dinner were provided daily. There were ample options for both vegetarian and non-vegetarian candidates.

reviews.review_heading: Not actually a great infrastructure, but a vibrant campus life with an industry-relevant curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The university provides a pretty okay infrastructure. The CSE/AI department has labs, low-speed Wi-Fi, and non-AC classrooms with projectors. The library is in good condition, and it is well stocked with fresh books. Hostel facilities are comfortable. The mess is hygienic and offers a variety of foods, while the canteen serves fast food and snacks. The university provides 24/7 medical services. For sports lovers, JLU has football, basketball, volleyball, badminton, and cricket, along with a gym ...

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the finest universities.
reviews.review_text: It has 3 types of hostels/dorms (called IIMA) are there in IIMA. Old dorms, new dorms, and married student hostel. Two messes are serving food to the whole IIMA community. In terms of quality, I would rate it as average, considering the type of food served. It is mandatory to stay in hostels for PGP students.

reviews.review_heading: JLU insiders - A great college.
reviews.review_text: Every class has projectors. The college has Wi-Fi facilities available everywhere. JIO sim doesn't work here; there's no signal for Jio, only Airtel connectivity. Our robotics lab is in a tie-up with a Singapore university, so yes, it's great. I am a day scholar, so I don't know about the hostel, but I have heard the mess is great. Medical facilities are available. Sports available are box cricket, basketball, football, and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: Jagran - A home away from home.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are provided in our hostel, like buses, Wi-Fi, mess, etc. Facilities are well-equipped with tools, machinery, a computer lab, a library, a canteen, an infirmary, a basketball court, a football ground, etc. The food quality in the mess and canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: JLU Bhopal: Industry-focused BMS programme with vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Jagran Lakecity University (JLU), Bhopal, is renowned for its modern infrastructure and vibrant campus environment, offering an exceptional educational experience. Spread across a lush 230-acre campus, JLU provides state-of-the-art facilities to support academic and extracurricular excellence. The university features contemporary academic blocks with well-equipped classrooms, high-tech computer labs, and a resource-rich library that includes digital and physical collections. It also boasts world...

reviews.review_heading: An awesome college with beautiful infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: You will love the infrastructure very much as they provide air-conditioned classrooms and an auditorium. Our canteens are decent. There is Wi-Fi all over the campus. Hostels are also great with the mess, a gym, sports, games, and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Everything perfect here.
reviews.review_text: JLU is Central Asia's No. 1 university, with the best infrastructure, and the center of attraction is the pyramid in the middle of the university. Classrooms are the best, labs are the best, even canteens are the best. Canteen food and hostel food both are perfect in taste. Hostel rooms are nice, and the mess timings are fixed. (When lectures exceed, you can inform the professor and leave for the mess). If we talk about sports, in JLU, if you excel in sports, you are really going to excel in eve...

reviews.review_heading: This college is a great option to choose.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very big and have comfortable seats and tables, and smart boards. The Wi-Fi only works outside the classroom and throughout the campus. The library is huge and has a separate floor for law books. The Wi-Fi is good, the mess food is amazing, and the campus is so green that it feels good to be there.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the campus, faculty and internships , really good infrastructure
reviews.review_text: In this college all the facilities are available like jlu wifi, in our classroom all the fans are properly working, the seats are too comfortable and are folding ones. The library is so big and all the books are available and very peaceful. People here support sports a lot and conducts tournaments like Infinito and virudika.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is equipped with modern classroom and is well maintained.
reviews.review_text: The university celebrates annual and technical festivals, including the Engineering Day festival in September. These festivals include various artistic performances, workshops, and competitions. The library has an extensive collection of academic books, materials, and journals across various disciplines. Each journal is available as a physical copy and digital research is provided through the university library portal. The university provides classrooms with smart technology, including projector...

reviews.review_heading: JLU - My Dream College?
reviews.review_text: Jagran Lakecity University is famous for its infrastructure, with newly built buildings. There are various labs, smart classrooms, and Wi-Fi available. The quality of food is good and affordable for students. There are different grounds for each type of game.

reviews.review_heading: Life at Jagran Lakecity University
reviews.review_text: The one thing about JLU is its infrastructure; it's really beautiful and lovely. The food quality is also very good. The campus is surrounded by nature and has a fresh environment making it a peaceful place to live with sitting areas and good spots to chill sometimes.

paragraphs: Jagaran Lakecity University has 3 types of scholarships i.e. JLU Scholarships for Academic Excellence, Shri Guru Dev Gupta Median Scholarships & JLU Elite Athlete Program. JLU Elite Athlete offers 100% scholarships on tuition fees, 50% to National Medal winners & 25% on National Participation. Apart from this, the University also gives Chancellor Freeships to 15 students each year across all programmes. The university also has tie-ups with Axis Bank, HDFC Bank & SBI Bank. However, students can avail of loans from any bank.
For MBA students with a GMAT score of 600 or lower than 650, the University gives a 25% discount. The scholarships available for Academic Excellence are shown below:

faqs.answer: A:    Vishnu Institute of Technology (VIT Bhimavaram) offers in-campus placement salaries in the range of INR 4.15 LPA to M.E./M.Tech students.
faqs.question: How much in-campus salary is offered at Vishnu Institute of Technology (VIT Bhimavaram) to M.E./M.Tech students?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Vishnu Institute of Technology (VIT Bhimavaram) offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Vishnu Institute of Technology (VIT Bhimavaram) offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Vishnu Institute of Technology fee structure for all the courses is around INR 87,900 to 4,12,000.

review_content.General: Infrastructure and facilities provided for our course and department are very good and of an excellent standard. The campus has Wi-Fi connections, well-equipped laboratories, large classrooms, and an up-to-date library with adequate academic and reference books. The hostel facilities are good, and basic facilities are provided for students. The food in the hostel canteen is not very good. They could be improved in terms of taste and variety. The canteen food is fine. Medical facilities are provided on campus for students. The sports and games facilities are satisfactory, providing opportunities for indoor as well as outdoor games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure of the college and teaching by faculty are good.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 80-95 percent of students were placed in B.Tech. Coming to ECE, around 80-85 percent of students got placed. Regarding Information Technology (IT) and Computer Science Engineering (CSE), more than 90 percent of students got placed. The highest package offered is 25 LPA, and the lowest offered is 3.6 LPA. Recruiting companies include TCS, MNCs, Qualcomm, Tech Mahindra, Flipkart, and some other companies. 87 percent of students got internships in companies like Tech Mahindra, TCS, Logix, Gen AI, etc. Top roles are Manager, Marketing Manager, Sales Manager, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Vishnu Institute of Technology - A path for the right future.

review_content.Placements: All the students will get a job with an average package of 5 to 6 LPA. The highest package of 2025 year seniors is 13 LPA for a girl and a boy who got placement in Gemini as an ML expert. The more likely companies that come for placements are HP, TCS, Capgemini, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my campus is super, and the Wi-Fi is freely available in hostels and libraries. The quality of food is awesome, and non-vegetarian food is kept twice a week. Every day morning, boiled food is provided. The medical facilities are available 24/7 in the college itself. There is a dental and medical shop available, and also, more discounts are available for students. There are 2 big grounds for girls and separate basketball courts for boys and girls, and there are also two big separate badminton courts available. Boys have the gym and big grounds for exercise.

faqs.question: Q: What is the cut off of Vishnu Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: Vishnu Institute of Technology (VIT Bhimavaram) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.

overview_faqs.question: Is Vishnu Institute of Technology (VIT Bhimavaram) a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Vishnu Institute of Technology (VIT Bhimavaram) is a well-known institution for MBA/PGDM, B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Vishnu Institute of Technology (VIT Bhimavaram) has a rating of 4.19 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.3 on Campus Life, 4.1 on Placements, 4.2 on Faculty and 4.3 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What clubs, societies, and events are active on Vishnu Institute of Technology, Bhimavaram campus?
overview_faqs.answer: Vishnu Institute of Technology offers a range of student clubs and activities. These range from technical skill clubs, such as SAE Collegiate Club and CodeChef SVECW Club. The institute also offers clubs based on specific themes such as astronomy, energy, and technical writing. VITB boasts a community radio station known as Radio Vishnu (90.4 FM). This radio is located on the premises of Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women (SVECW).

The quality of food is awesome, and non-vegetarian food is kept twice a week. Every day morning, boiled food is provided. The medical facilities are available 24/7 in the college itself. There is a dental and medical shop available, and also, more discounts are available for students. There are 2 big grounds for girls and separate basketball courts for boys and girls, and there are also two big separate badminton courts available. Boys have the gym and big grounds for exercise.

college_info.intro:
Indrashil University popular programmes are BSc and BTech. BSc students can enter various fields such as Scientific Research and Analysis, Environmental and Conservation Management, and others after completing the course. Students can beccome Ecologist, Microbiologist, Forensic Scientist, or Scientific/Medical Laboratory Officer.
Indrashil University BSc students are placed in top companies such as Accenture, Infosys, IBM, Flipkart, Google, Amazon, Capgemini, and others. BSc departments have labs with all the necessary equipment/ instruments required to perform experiments in Analytical, Organic, and Physical Chemistry for conducting research and teaching in advanced areas of Chemistry.
Indrashil University Ahmedabad BTech programme is quite good. BTech also has minor specialisations such as 5G and the Internet of Things, Wireless Networks, Mobile Computing, Big Data Analytics, Security in Wireless Networks, Cyber Security, and others. reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college in all aspects.

review_content.Placements: Placements are fairly good this year. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. About 10 students got an internship this year in well-reputed companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Many best facilities are provided such as a library, outstanding infrastructure, canteens, Wi-Fi campus, 2 big sports amenities, 4 computer labs and branch-wise labs. There are also 2 big canteens in our college, and mess food canteen is also very good.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are highly qualified, skilled, talented, helpful and have a doctorate degree. The course curriculum is highly planned and decorated. Students can have an excellent time for skills development.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: A disaster experience, dissatisfied with facilities, course, culture, faculty and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: At the time of admission, I was told that there are a total of 120 students in B.tech. As we are the first batch of our college, there are a total of 22 students only. As I said this is the first year of college so when we will pass out that time I will come to know about the placements and salary offered. There are no such roles offered in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are labs, classrooms and a library with no Wi-Fi and as it is located in the village area network some times don't show up. As for girls hostel, there are restrictions and canteen food is hygienic, medical facilities are good and no sports are available for girls and there are no such games available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: A good college to study engineering, and a good environment to study.

review_content.Placements: There was just one student hired in Kadi location, but now 7 students are selected for jobs here. The highest salary offered is Rs. 12,000 per month. They offered posts of assistant electrical engineers. Companies like Zydus Cadila visited the campus and offered electrical engineer posts to four students. Our college supports students for the internship program.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a very good building and the best environment for studying. It's a totally silent place to study. Libraries are good. The college provides facilities like garden, parking lot, and canteen, etc. Classrooms are good and wide. The building is well-constructed. They also provide a good playing area. The college provides good space for a reading room in the library.

courses.overview: Indrashil University Course and Fees 2025 Indrashil University courses are provided across the Pharmacy, Engineering, Science, and various other streams. IU is a first-of-its-kind in Gujarat offering programmes in Life Sciences. The university focuses on research, academic, and professional development. Indrashil University Ahmedabad offers full-time degree courses as well as various short-term courses to students.

fee_structure.heading: Indrashil University Course and Fees 2025

faqs.answer: The admission criteria for Indrashil University courses is both merit-based and entrance-based. For some courses, admission to 50% of the seats is done via ACPC counselling and the rest of the seats are filled based on the performance of the candidate in the relevant entrance exam or qualifying examination.The table below shows the eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popular Indrashil University Courses:CoursesEligibilitySelection CriteriaBE / BTechCandidate must have passed class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as compulsory subjects and with minimum percentage of marks as decided by the Government of Gujarat under the rules of admission.50% Seats- GUCET+ ACPC Counselling50% Seats- JEE MainBScClass 12 from a recognised boardMerit-basedBPharmaClass 12 from a recognised board with Physics, Chemistry, Biology and Mathematics (optional)50% Seats- GUCET+ ACPC Counselling50% Seats- UQBCAClass 12 from a recognised boardMerit-basedBBAClass 12 from a recognised boardMerit-based
faqs.question: Q: What are the entrance exams accepted by Indrashil University?

faqs.answer: To get admission into Indrashil University, students must meet the preset admission criteria of the desired course before proceeding with the application. Eligible students can then apply for the course of choice by filling out the online application form. The university accepts students on both merit and entrance basis. 50% of the total seats for BTech and BPharma are filled in through ACPC counselling. The remaining are filled on a merit basis or via national-level entrance tests, such as JEE Mains. For the remaining courses, admissions are merit-based. Once a seat is offered, students need to pay the admission fees and go through document verification.

Eligible students can then apply for the course of choice by filling out the online application form. review_summary.college_name: Indrashil University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Enjoy your campus life at Indrashil University.

content.Placements: In our course, 85% of students were successfully placed in different companies. The salary packages are varied, with the highest being 8LPA and the lowest at 3.5LPA and the average package is standing at 5LPA. Also, in our batch, 90% of students secured internships in various companies. In computer Science, another student is going abroad to pursue a masters degree at a reputed university.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are commendable in my college, providing students with a conducive learning environment. Well-equipped computer labs and maintained laboratories enhance your learning experience. Taking about the hostel mess, the quality of food is 3.5 out of 5 stars, and the different types of menu available in the mess. The library is well-maintained and the collection of books is too large which is helpful for the student. The university cricket and football teams traveled to Mumbai to participate in their respective games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Biotechnology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good for students.

content.Placements: Many placements are available. Around 3 to 4 LPA is offered. Cadila pharmaceuticals and Nirma institute are the recruiters. Most students pass with distinction with a good SGPA.
content.Infrastructure: Full availability of instruments and machines for dissertation. Wi-Fi and labs with full equipment. Classrooms and library are available. There is a good quality of food and rooms with beds, lights, fans, etc. Canteen has good surroundings and the campus is better.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful and good at teaching. They teach personnel. The course is good and students go forward with that. Exams are difficult but also good for students. The pass percentage is above 60%. Test-1 and test-2 are good for students for exams.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college in all aspects.

content.Placements: Placements are fairly good this year. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. About 10 students got an internship this year in well-reputed companies.
content.Infrastructure: Many best facilities are provided such as a library, outstanding infrastructure, canteens, Wi-Fi campus, 2 big sports amenities, 4 computer labs and branch-wise labs. There are also 2 big canteens in our college, and mess food canteen is also very good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are highly qualified, skilled, talented, helpful and have a doctorate degree. The course curriculum is highly planned and decorated. Students can have an excellent time for skills development.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: A disaster experience, dissatisfied with facilities, course, culture, faculty and infrastructure.

content.Placements: At the time of admission, I was told that there are a total of 120 students in B.tech. As we are the first batch of our college, there are a total of 22 students only. As I said this is the first year of college so when we will pass out that time I will come to know about the placements and salary offered. There are no such roles offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: There are labs, classrooms and a library with no Wi-Fi and as it is located in the village area network some times don't show up. As for girls hostel, there are restrictions and canteen food is hygienic, medical facilities are good and no sports are available for girls and there are no such games available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: A good college to study engineering, and a good environment to study.

content.Placements: There was just one student hired in Kadi location, but now 7 students are selected for jobs here. The highest salary offered is Rs. 12,000 per month. They offered posts of assistant electrical engineers. Companies like Zydus Cadila visited the campus and offered electrical engineer posts to four students. Our college supports students for the internship program.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a very good building and the best environment for studying. It's a totally silent place to study. Libraries are good. The college provides facilities like garden, parking lot, and canteen, etc. Classrooms are good and wide. The building is well-constructed. They also provide a good playing area. The college provides good space for a reading room in the library.

admission_process.title: Indrashil University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Indrashil University admission 2025is open for all programmes. The university offers eight courses in the fields ofEngineering and Technology, Pharmacy, and Sciencesat undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral levels. TheIndrashil Universitycourses are offered via its three constituent schools and they are the School of Engineering, School of Sciences and School of Pharmacy. The admission criteria for Indrashil University admissions are both merit-based and entrance-based. Admission to 50% of the seats is done via ACPC counselling and the rest of the seats are filled based on the performance of the candidate in the relevant entrance exam or qualifying examination.

Indrashil University course admissionsare offered in various streams via its three constituent schools, they are theSchool of Pharmacy, the School of Engineering and the School of Sciences. Candidates seeking admission to Indrashil University courses must begin their admission process by matching the eligibility criteria of their desired course. The table below shows the eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popularIndrashil University Courses:

Candidate must have passed class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as compulsory subjects and with a minimum percentage of marks as decided by the Government of Gujarat under the rules of admission.

TheIndrashil University admission processbegins with meeting the course-specific eligibility criteria followed by filling out the application forms and apparing for the selection rounds. TheIU course admission criteriaare either merit-based or entrance-based. Interested candidates can check the course-specific eligibility and selection criteria from the above-mentioned table. Also, the step-wise Indrashil University admission process is mentioned below:
Eligible candidates are required to apply for their desired programme through the Indrashil University official website before the deadline.

The Indrashil University selection criteria for 50% of the total BTech and BPhrama seats is through ACPC counselling and the rest of the seats are filled by considering either merit in the qualifying exam or national level entrance exam such as JEE Main. For other courses, the admission criteria are merit-based.

Selected candidates will be notified by the University's end. Shortlisted candidates are required to pay the admission confirmation fee and appear for the document verification process to complete their admission process.

placement_data.title: Indrashil University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The placements are concluded with a 100% placement rate . As per the latest report, the highest package offered to the School of Engineering (SOE), and the School of Sciences (SOS) during Indrashil University placement 2023 stood at INR 45 LPA and INR 5.10 LPA , respectively. Further, over 150 recruiters participated in the placement process 2023 and placed students in various sectors viz., Consulting, BFSI, FMCG, etc. The top recruiters of Indrashil University in 2023 included Accenture, Infosys, Google, Amazon, Capgemini, IBM, Flipkart, ONGC, Adani Walmart, Goldman Sachs, Cisco, Morgan Stanley, Cognizant , etc.

description: Indrashil University cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:

The Indrashil University cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Indrashil University BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 27250 and 33092 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering. The first round cuto

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 27250 for the general HS quota.
On the contrary the least competitive specialisations for admission in 2024 were B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering (VLSI Design and Technology) and

Indrashil University accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Indrashil University can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Indrashil University GUJCET cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and for all categories and quotas in the form of opening and closing ranks. In 2025, Indrashil University B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, ranged from 17923 to 28931 for students belonging to the General HS quota.

Among all the specialisations, B.Tech. in Information and Technology and B.Tech. in Chemical and Biochemical Engineering were the most competitive for admission in the General HS category. To view the first and last roun

GUJCET 2025 cutoff ranks for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course range between 17923 to 28931 in the General HS category. B.Tech. in Information and Technology emerged as the most competitive specialisation for admission, with a last round closing rank of 17923 under the HS quota.
To view the detailed cutoff ranks across different categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options provided below:

The Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC) released the GUJCET 2025 cutoffs for various participating institutions for admissions to all branches, rounds, categories, and quotas. Aspirants aiming for admission to the next academic session can refer to the table provided below to know the important GUJCET 2026 dates.

Indrashil University excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. reviews.review_heading: Enjoy your campus life at Indrashil University.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are commendable in my college, providing students with a conducive learning environment. Well-equipped computer labs and maintained laboratories enhance your learning experience. Taking about the hostel mess, the quality of food is 3.5 out of 5 stars, and the different types of menu available in the mess. The library is well-maintained and the collection of books is too large which is helpful for the student. The university cricket and football teams traveled to...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for students.
reviews.review_text: Full availability of instruments and machines for dissertation. Wi-Fi and labs with full equipment. Classrooms and library are available. There is a good quality of food and rooms with beds, lights, fans, etc. Canteen has good surroundings and the campus is better.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Many best facilities are provided such as a library, outstanding infrastructure, canteens, Wi-Fi campus, 2 big sports amenities, 4 computer labs and branch-wise labs. There are also 2 big canteens in our college, and mess food canteen is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: A disaster experience, dissatisfied with facilities, course, culture, faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There are labs, classrooms and a library with no Wi-Fi and as it is located in the village area network some times don't show up. As for girls hostel, there are restrictions and canteen food is hygienic, medical facilities are good and no sports are available for girls and there are no such games available.

reviews.review_heading: A good college to study engineering, and a good environment to study.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very good building and the best environment for studying. It's a totally silent place to study. Libraries are good. The college provides facilities like garden, parking lot, and canteen, etc. Classrooms are good and wide. The building is well-constructed. They also provide a good playing area. The college provides good space for a reading room in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Good for enjoining college life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of IIST is at it's best, compared to other colleges in North Gujarat. All types of labs are there. There are a cricket ground, football ground and badminton ground in the campus. There are also indoor games like table tennis, pool table, chess etc. There is no hostel facility in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Experience at IIST will be awesome.
reviews.review_text: IIST has three main buildings, a canteen, a workshop and sports ground. It has a garden starting from the entrance. Now, a hostel and another building are under construction. The workshop is Gujarat's biggest workshop among all engineering colleges in Gujarat.

reviews.review_heading: Indrashil Institute of Science and Technology, Rajpur is an awesome college with good teaching.
reviews.review_text: Indrashil Institute of Science and Technology, Rajpur infrastructure is too good. In this college, the lab facility, cricket ground, football ground, table tennis, AutoCAD lab, etc., are good. The practical lab is good. There is a kabaddi ground, volleyball ground, and badminton ground.

reviews.review_heading: An average institute for quality students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well-developed in the last couple of years. Canteen, classroom, library, playground and all these are developed very nicely, but there is a problem in labs. The required equipment is not for labs, so students cant do their practicals there.

reviews.review_heading: The best study place for an engineering in any stream.
reviews.review_text: The atmosphere of the college is very good. A big compound, canteen, garden and buildings are available in the college. The classrooms and facilities are good. It is a nice place to study, and it provides a good environment. The parking facility is good, and management is good. The Wi-Fi is free in the library, and the sports ground is big.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college with great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Almost all the facilities are available on campus. Labs are perfectly made for a better understanding. Classrooms are wide and have projectors. It is a perfect college with a good atmosphere. Every Indian festival is celebrated here.

reviews.review_heading: It's one of the best Engineering colleges ever.
reviews.review_text: The Indrashil university has a very lush green hygienic and spacious campus. The infrastructure is very good and well structured. The classrooms are good and having good facilities. Laboratory facilities are excellent. IU has the best facilities of library with updated materials and supportive reading books.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best universities in Gujarat, where you can improve your skills and knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The University upgraded it's classroom to facilitate teaching through modern tools & techniques. There is a lush green campus. Girls hostel facilities are available within campus. The University has well-equipped classroom with LED Projectors. The Quality of Food is Hygienic. well-equipped laboratories are there. In Lab There NMR, HPLC and GC are available for practical conduction.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and decent.
reviews.review_text:
You can't use college Wi-Fi. It is protected.
Infrastructure is okay.
The library is pretty good. Food is amazing.
For Rs. 40, you can have your meal.

reviews.review_heading: This university is satisfying and I would recommend to all B.Sc, M.Sc, Phd and B.Tech aspirants.
reviews.review_text: Course are syllabus is very good because it's a private university so it has its own course and they made a great course inspired by IIT's syllabus. All faculty members are decent. Most of them are PhDs and some of them are pursuing. There are 2 canteens in the college.
